Form unique bonds with each of your cubs, each with their own personalities and needs. Your interactions determine their growth and survival.

### Stunning Visuals
Explore a beautifully rendered world, from lush forests to desolate wastelands, all brought to life with a distinctive art style.

## Gameplay Overview

*Endling – Extinction Is Forever* combines exploration, survival, and narrative-driven gameplay. Players must balance the needs of their cubs while avoiding threats like hunters and polluted areas. The game’s day-night cycle adds urgency, as dangers increase under the cover of darkness. With no combat system, stealth and strategy are your only tools for survival. The game’s minimalist UI keeps the focus on the emotional weight of your journey, making every moment feel personal and impactful.

frontmatter.title: Endling – Extinction Is Forever
frontmatter.description: Endling – Extinction Is Forever is a poignant survival adventure game where you play as the last fox mother on Earth, protecting her cubs in a world ravaged by human destruction. Experience a heart-wrenching tale of survival and hope.

minimum.processor: Intel Core i5-2300 or AMD FX-4350
minimum.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 660 or AMD Radeon HD 7850

recommended.processor: Intel Core i7-3770 or AMD FX-8350
recommended.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 970 or AMD Radeon RX 580

content:
Police Shootout throws you into the heart of urban chaos as a rookie cop tasked with taking down a ruthless crime syndicate. With your trusty sidearm and quick reflexes, you'll navigate through dangerous streets, engage in intense shootouts, and uncover a web of corruption.

In Police Shootout, you'll experience the life of a police officer on the edge. The game blends fast-paced action with strategic decision-making, as you choose between brute force and tactical precision. The immersive storyline keeps you hooked, while the dynamic environments and realistic gunplay make every encounter feel authentic.

## Key Features

### Intense Gunfights
Engage in heart-pounding shootouts with realistic weapon mechanics and dynamic enemy AI. Every bullet counts in this high-stakes battle for justice.

### Tactical Gameplay
Plan your approach carefully—use cover, flank enemies, and coordinate with backup to take down criminals efficiently.

### Gripping Storyline
Unravel a deep narrative filled with twists, betrayals, and moral dilemmas as you rise through the ranks of the police force.

### Dynamic Environments
From dark alleyways to bustling city streets, each location offers unique challenges and opportunities for tactical play.

### Character Progression
Upgrade your skills, unlock new weapons, and customize your loadout to suit your playstyle as you progress.

## Gameplay Overview

Police Shootout combines first-person shooter mechanics with strategic elements, offering a balanced mix of action and thought-provoking gameplay. Players will face off against increasingly challenging enemies, requiring quick reflexes and smart tactics. The game's physics-based combat and realistic damage system add depth to every encounter.

Whether you prefer stealthy takedowns or all-out assaults, Police Shootout adapts to your style. The branching storyline ensures replayability, with multiple endings based on your choices. Get ready to enforce the law—your way.

frontmatter.title: Police Shootout
frontmatter.description: Police Shootout is an intense first-person shooter where you step into the shoes of a rookie cop facing off against criminal masterminds. Experience high-stakes gunfights, tactical gameplay, and a gripping storyline in this action-packed adventure.

content:
Mini Maker: Make a Thing invites players into a vibrant world of creativity and problem-solving. Whether you're crafting a quirky gadget or solving intricate puzzles, this game offers endless possibilities for innovation.

In Mini Maker: Make a Thing, you step into the role of a budding inventor in a charming workshop filled with tools and materials. Your goal? Design and build unique objects to solve challenges or simply let your imagination run wild. From whimsical contraptions to practical creations, every project is a chance to explore your creativity.

## What Makes Mini Maker Special

### Endless Creativity
Unleash your imagination with a vast array of tools, materials, and blueprints. Create anything from simple toys to complex machines.

### Puzzle Challenges
Solve engaging puzzles that test your creativity and problem-solving skills. Each challenge offers a unique twist.

### Workshop Customization
Personalize your workshop with decorations, upgrades, and layouts that reflect your style.

### Share Your Creations
Export your designs and share them with friends or the Mini Maker community for inspiration and feedback.

### Family-Friendly Fun
Enjoy a game designed for all ages, with intuitive controls and a welcoming atmosphere.

## Core Mechanics

Mini Maker: Make a Thing combines sandbox creativity with puzzle-solving mechanics. Players gather materials, follow blueprints, or invent their own designs to complete challenges. The game encourages experimentation, rewarding players for thinking outside the box. Whether you're crafting a simple gadget or an elaborate invention, Mini Maker offers a satisfying blend of creativity and strategy.

frontmatter.title: Mini Maker: Make a Thing
frontmatter.description: Mini Maker: Make a Thing is a creative simulation game where players design and build unique objects. Unleash your imagination, solve puzzles, and craft inventions in this sandbox adventure.

content:
Card Shark immerses you in the shadowy world of 18th-century France, where cunning and deception are your greatest tools. This game combines card mechanics with stealth and strategy, offering a unique experience for players who love intrigue and historical settings.

In Card Shark, you play as a young apprentice who learns the art of cheating from a mysterious mentor. Together, you navigate high-stakes card games, outsmarting nobles and avoiding detection. Each game is a test of skill, strategy, and nerves, as you rise through society’s ranks.

## Key Features

### Sleight of Hand Mechanics
Master a variety of card tricks and techniques, from false shuffles to card peeking, to gain an edge in every game.

### Historical Setting
Experience the lavish yet treacherous world of 18th-century France, filled with intrigue, betrayal, and high society.

### Stealth and Strategy
Balance your card skills with stealth tactics to avoid detection and outwit your opponents.

### Engaging Storyline
Follow a captivating narrative filled with twists, turns, and memorable characters.

### Challenging Gameplay
Face increasingly difficult opponents and scenarios that test your skills and adaptability.

## Gameplay Overview
Card Shark blends traditional card game mechanics with innovative stealth elements. Players must learn and execute card tricks while managing their risk of being caught. Each game is a delicate balance of strategy and timing, as you aim to win without arousing suspicion. The game’s unique mechanics and historical setting create an immersive experience that keeps players engaged from start to finish.

frontmatter.title: Card Shark
frontmatter.description: Card Shark is a thrilling card game adventure set in 18th-century France. Master deception, strategy, and sleight of hand to outwit nobles and climb society’s ranks in this unique blend of stealth and card-based gameplay.

content:
Step into the world of automotive artistry with Car Detailing Simulator, where every scratch washed away and every polish applied brings you closer to automotive perfection. This game offers a unique blend of creativity and relaxation, making it a must-play for car lovers and detail enthusiasts.

In Car Detailing Simulator, you’ll take on the role of a professional car detailer tasked with restoring vehicles to their former glory. From dirty and dusty wrecks to gleaming showroom-ready beauties, every car tells a story. Use a variety of tools, from pressure washers to wax applicators, and unlock customization options to make each car uniquely yours.

## Key Features

### Realistic Detailing Tools
Experience the satisfaction of using authentic tools like clay bars, polishing machines, and microfiber cloths to clean and restore cars.

### Extensive Car Collection
Work on a wide range of vehicles, from classic muscle cars to modern supercars, each with unique detailing challenges.

### Customization Options
Personalize cars with custom paint jobs, decals, and interior upgrades to create your dream ride.

### Relaxing Atmosphere
Enjoy a calming soundtrack and soothing visuals as you focus on the meditative process of car detailing.

### Progressive Challenges
Take on increasingly complex detailing tasks, from simple washes to full restorations, as you build your detailing empire.

## Gameplay Overview
Car Detailing Simulator combines precision and creativity, allowing players to meticulously clean, repair, and customize vehicles. Start by washing away dirt and grime, then move on to polishing, waxing, and buffing to achieve a flawless finish. As you progress, unlock advanced tools and techniques to tackle tougher jobs. Whether you’re restoring a vintage car or customizing a modern sports car, the game offers endless opportunities for creativity and relaxation. Perfect for unwinding after a long day or indulging your passion for cars!

frontmatter.title: Car Detailing Simulator
frontmatter.description: Car Detailing Simulator is a relaxing and immersive simulation game where players restore, clean, and customize cars to perfection. Perfect for car enthusiasts and casual gamers alike!

content:
Step into the shoes of a budding entrepreneur in Trader Life Simulator, where every decision shapes your journey from humble beginnings to a trading tycoon.

In Trader Life Simulator, you’ll navigate a bustling economy filled with opportunities and challenges. Buy low, sell high, and master the art of negotiation to grow your business. Set in a dynamic world, the game blends strategy and simulation, allowing you to craft your own path to success.

## Key Features

### Dynamic Economy
Experience a living, breathing economy where prices fluctuate based on supply and demand. Stay ahead by predicting market trends and making smart investments.

### Resource Management
Manage your inventory, finances, and workforce efficiently. Balance your budget while expanding your trading operations across multiple locations.

### Negotiation System
Hone your negotiation skills to strike the best deals. Each interaction with traders and customers can lead to lucrative opportunities or costly mistakes.

### Customizable Business
Build and customize your trading empire. Upgrade your shops, hire skilled employees, and unlock new products to dominate the market.

### Challenging Scenarios
Face unique challenges like economic crashes, rival traders, and unexpected events. Adapt your strategies to overcome these obstacles and thrive.

## Gameplay Overview
Trader Life Simulator offers a deep and engaging experience where every decision matters. Start small by trading basic goods, then expand your operations to include exotic products and international markets. The game’s realistic mechanics ensure that success requires careful planning and strategic thinking. Whether you’re negotiating deals, managing resources, or competing with rivals, Trader Life Simulator keeps you on your toes with its immersive gameplay and endless possibilities.

frontmatter.title: Trader Life Simulator
frontmatter.description: Trader Life Simulator is a captivating economy simulation game where you build a trading empire from scratch. Manage resources, negotiate deals, and dominate markets in this immersive strategy experience.

content:
Road Maintenance Simulator puts you in charge of maintaining a sprawling highway network, ensuring smooth traffic flow and safe travel for thousands of drivers. From repairing potholes to managing maintenance crews, every decision impacts the city’s infrastructure.

Set in a dynamic urban environment, Road Maintenance Simulator challenges you to balance limited resources, unpredictable weather, and growing traffic demands. As the city expands, so do your responsibilities, requiring strategic planning and quick problem-solving. Whether you’re patching cracks or upgrading roads, every task feels rewarding and impactful.

## Key Features

### Dynamic Weather System
Experience realistic weather conditions that affect road conditions and maintenance schedules, from heavy rain to snowstorms.

### Complex Traffic Management
Monitor and optimize traffic flow using real-time data, ensuring minimal delays and accidents.

### Resource Allocation
Manage budgets, equipment, and crews efficiently to keep the city’s highways in top shape.

### Upgradeable Infrastructure
Unlock advanced tools and techniques to improve road quality and handle increasing traffic demands.

## Gameplay Overview

In Road Maintenance Simulator, you’ll oversee every aspect of highway upkeep, from routine inspections to emergency repairs. Use a variety of tools and vehicles to tackle different challenges, and make strategic decisions to keep the city moving. The game combines realism with accessibility, offering a deep yet intuitive experience for simulation fans. Whether you’re a casual player or a management enthusiast, Road Maintenance Simulator delivers a unique and engaging gameplay experience.

frontmatter.title: Road Maintenance Simulator
frontmatter.description: Step into the world of Road Maintenance Simulator, a realistic city-building and management game where you oversee the upkeep of a bustling highway network. Repair potholes, manage crews, and optimize traffic flow in this immersive simulation experience.

content:
Step into a post-apocalyptic Earth and embark on a journey of rebuilding and discovery in No Place Like Home. This farming and simulation game offers a unique twist on the genre, blending exploration, crafting, and environmental restoration.

In No Place Like Home, you play as Ellen, a young woman returning to her grandfather’s farm only to find the world in ruins. Your mission is to restore the land, clean up pollution, and uncover the secrets of what happened to Earth. Along the way, you’ll farm crops, raise animals, and craft tools to rebuild a thriving community.

## Key Features

### Environmental Restoration
Clean up polluted areas, plant trees, and restore ecosystems to bring life back to the barren world.

### Farming and Crafting
Grow crops, raise animals, and craft useful items to sustain yourself and improve your homestead.

### Exploration
Discover hidden treasures, abandoned cities, and mysterious ruins as you explore the vast, post-apocalyptic landscape.

### Rebuilding Society
Help rebuild a thriving community by restoring homes, attracting new residents, and unlocking new areas.

### Unique Storyline
Uncover the secrets of Earth’s downfall and the fate of its former inhabitants through a captivating narrative.

## Gameplay Overview
No Place Like Home combines farming simulation with adventure and exploration. Players manage resources, craft tools, and restore the environment while uncovering a rich storyline. The game’s core mechanics focus on balancing farming tasks, exploration, and rebuilding efforts. With its charming visuals and engaging gameplay, No Place Like Home offers a fresh take on the farming genre, inviting players to create a better future in a broken world.

frontmatter.title: No Place Like Home
frontmatter.description: No Place Like Home is a charming farming and simulation game set in a post-apocalyptic world. Rebuild Earth, restore nature, and uncover mysteries while farming, crafting, and exploring.

content:
Step into the shoes of a skilled craftsman in *Workshop Simulator*, a heartwarming simulation game where you build, repair, and customize tools and furniture in your very own workshop. With its soothing atmosphere and endless creative possibilities, this game is perfect for players who love to tinker and create at their own pace.

In *Workshop Simulator*, you start with a humble workshop and a few basic tools. As you complete projects, earn money, and expand your space, you’ll unlock new materials, blueprints, and advanced equipment. The game’s charming visuals and satisfying mechanics make every creation feel rewarding, whether you’re crafting a simple wooden chair or restoring an antique clock.

## Key Features

### Authentic Crafting System
Experience realistic crafting with physics-based tools and materials. Saw, sand, hammer, and paint your way to perfection.

### Workshop Customization
Expand and decorate your workshop to reflect your personal style. Add workbenches, storage, and even cozy decor to make it your own.

### Repair & Restore
Take on jobs to repair broken items for clients. Each project has its own challenges and rewards.

### Creative Freedom
Design unique furniture and tools from scratch or follow blueprints. The choice is yours.

### Relaxing Atmosphere
Enjoy a stress-free experience with no time limits or pressure. Work at your own pace and savor the joy of creation.

## Gameplay Overview

*Workshop Simulator* focuses on hands-on crafting and workshop management. Players start with simple projects, learning the basics of tool handling and material selection. As you progress, you’ll take on more complex tasks, like restoring heirlooms or crafting custom orders for townsfolk. The game’s intuitive controls and detailed mechanics make it easy to dive in, while the depth of customization ensures long-term engagement.

Whether you’re a fan of simulation games or just looking for a relaxing creative outlet, *Workshop Simulator* offers a uniquely satisfying experience. From the sound of sawing wood to the thrill of completing a masterpiece, every moment feels rewarding.

frontmatter.title: Workshop Simulator
frontmatter.description: Workshop Simulator is a cozy crafting and building game where you design, repair, and upgrade tools and furniture in your own workshop. Perfect for fans of relaxing simulation games with creative freedom.

content:
Signal Simulator offers a unique blend of space exploration and puzzle-solving, set in a meticulously crafted interstellar environment. Players take on the role of a scientist tasked with detecting and decoding mysterious signals from across the cosmos.

In Signal Simulator, you’ll operate a fully functional radio telescope, scanning the skies for anomalies. The game’s realistic mechanics and immersive sound design create an unparalleled sense of discovery. As you progress, you’ll encounter increasingly complex signals, each with its own story to unravel.

## Key Features

### Advanced Signal Detection
Use a highly detailed radio telescope interface to scan the skies and detect signals from deep space. The game simulates real-world astronomy techniques for an authentic experience.

### Dynamic Storytelling
Uncover a rich narrative woven through mysterious signals and cryptic messages. Each discovery brings you closer to understanding the universe’s secrets.

### Realistic Space Environment
Explore a vast, procedurally generated galaxy filled with unique celestial bodies and phenomena. The game’s visuals and audio create an immersive space exploration experience.

### Puzzle-Solving Challenges
Decode complex signals using logic and strategy. Each puzzle offers a unique challenge that tests your problem-solving skills.

### Customizable Equipment
Upgrade and customize your radio telescope to improve signal detection and decoding capabilities. Tailor your setup to match your playstyle.

## Gameplay Overview

Signal Simulator combines exploration, strategy, and puzzle-solving into a seamless experience. Players must manage their resources, upgrade equipment, and analyze signals to progress. The game’s pacing encourages thoughtful decision-making and rewards curiosity.

As you decode signals, you’ll unlock new areas of the galaxy and uncover hidden lore. The blend of simulation and narrative ensures that every session feels fresh and engaging. Whether you’re a fan of space exploration or puzzle games, Signal Simulator offers a uniquely satisfying experience.

frontmatter.title: Signal Simulator
frontmatter.description: Signal Simulator is a captivating space exploration and puzzle game where players decipher mysterious signals from distant galaxies. Immerse yourself in a realistic simulation of deep-space discovery and uncover the secrets of the universe.

content:
Tank Mechanic Simulator offers a one-of-a-kind experience for history buffs and simulation enthusiasts. Step into the shoes of a tank mechanic and uncover the secrets of World War II-era armored vehicles.

In Tank Mechanic Simulator, you’ll explore abandoned battlefields, recover damaged tanks, and bring them back to life. The game combines meticulous restoration mechanics with historical accuracy, allowing you to learn about tank designs while enjoying hands-on gameplay. From rusted relics to fully operational war machines, every project is a rewarding journey.

## Key Features

### Tank Restoration
Restore tanks to their former glory by repairing engines, cleaning rust, and replacing broken parts. Each tank requires careful attention to detail.

### Exploration
Venture into abandoned battlefields and dig sites to uncover hidden tanks and artifacts. Use metal detectors and excavation tools to find rare components.

### Historical Accuracy
Learn about real-world tanks used during World War II. The game features authentic designs, blueprints, and historical information.

### Custom Garage
Build and expand your garage to house your growing collection of restored tanks. Organize your workspace for maximum efficiency.

### Tank Testing
Once restored, take your tanks for a test drive on custom tracks. Experience their power and performance firsthand.

## Gameplay Overview

Tank Mechanic Simulator combines simulation, exploration, and historical education into a single engaging package. Players start by salvaging tanks from the field, then meticulously restore them in their garage. The game’s realistic mechanics require you to diagnose issues, source parts, and assemble components with precision. As you progress, you’ll unlock new tools and upgrades, enabling you to tackle more complex projects. Whether you’re a history enthusiast or a simulation fan, Tank Mechanic Simulator offers a rewarding and educational experience.

frontmatter.title: Tank Mechanic Simulator
frontmatter.description: Tank Mechanic Simulator is a unique simulation game where you restore and repair historical tanks. Dive into detailed mechanics, uncover tank secrets, and build your collection in this immersive World War II-themed experience.

content:
Drug Business plunges you into the dark underbelly of organized crime, challenging you to build and manage a thriving drug empire. Set in a sprawling open world, the game combines strategy, resource management, and high-stakes decision-making.

In Drug Business, you start as a small-time dealer and work your way up to becoming a kingpin. The game immerses you in a morally ambiguous world where every choice has consequences. Outsmart rival gangs, evade law enforcement, and expand your territory to dominate the criminal underworld.

## Key Features

### Vast Open World
Explore a detailed cityscape filled with opportunities and dangers. Each district offers unique challenges and resources to exploit.

### Dynamic Economy
Control supply chains and manipulate the market to maximize profits. Prices fluctuate based on demand, competition, and police activity.

### Gang Management
Recruit and train loyal henchmen, assign roles, and manage gang operations to ensure your empire runs smoothly.

### Rival Factions
Compete with other gangs for territory and influence. Form alliances or engage in brutal turf wars to secure your dominance.

### Law Enforcement Evasion
Stay one step ahead of the police by bribing officials, laundering money, and avoiding suspicious activities.

### Customizable Empire
Personalize your drug empire with safehouses, production facilities, and distribution networks tailored to your strategy.

## Gameplay Overview
Drug Business blends strategy and simulation with immersive storytelling. Players must balance risk and reward, making tactical decisions to grow their empire while avoiding detection. The game’s open-world design encourages exploration and experimentation, offering endless possibilities for expansion. Whether you prefer stealthy operations or all-out gang warfare, Drug Business delivers a thrilling criminal experience.

frontmatter.title: Drug Business
frontmatter.description: Drug Business is a gritty crime simulation game where you build and manage a drug empire. Navigate a dangerous open world, make strategic decisions, and outsmart rivals to dominate the underworld. Perfect for fans of strategy and crime games.

content:
Welcome to Happy's Humble Burger Farm, where flipping burgers is the least of your worries. By day, you’ll run a bustling fast-food restaurant, but by night, the farm reveals its terrifying secrets. Can you survive the shift?

Happy's Humble Burger Farm combines the mundane tasks of burger flipping with a spine-tingling horror narrative. Set in a seemingly ordinary burger joint, the game gradually unravels a dark and twisted story as you work through increasingly eerie night shifts. The game’s unique blend of simulation and horror creates an unforgettable experience that keeps players on edge.

## Key Features

### Dual Gameplay Modes
Manage your burger joint during the day with cooking, cleaning, and customer service, then survive the horrors that emerge at night.

### Psychological Horror
Experience a slowly unfolding narrative filled with unsettling discoveries and mind-bending twists that challenge your perception of reality.

### Immersive Atmosphere
The game’s retro aesthetic and eerie sound design create a hauntingly nostalgic yet deeply unsettling environment.

### Dynamic Events
Randomized events and encounters ensure no two playthroughs are the same, keeping the tension fresh and unpredictable.

### Deep Lore
Uncover hidden documents and clues that piece together the dark history of Happy's Humble Burger Farm and its mysterious owner.

## Gameplay Overview

Happy's Humble Burger Farm tasks players with balancing the demands of a fast-food restaurant during the day while surviving supernatural horrors at night. During daylight hours, you’ll cook burgers, clean up, and serve customers to earn money and upgrades. But as night falls, the farm transforms into a nightmare realm where strange creatures and eerie phenomena test your sanity.

The game’s unique mechanics blend resource management with survival horror, requiring players to strategize their time and resources carefully. Whether you’re perfecting your burger-flipping skills or hiding from otherworldly threats, every decision impacts your chances of survival. With its gripping narrative and tense gameplay, Happy's Humble Burger Farm offers a one-of-a-kind experience that will leave you questioning what’s real.

frontmatter.title: Happy's Humble Burger Farm
frontmatter.description: Happy's Humble Burger Farm is a chilling horror simulation game where you manage a fast-food joint by day and uncover dark secrets by night. Survive the eerie night shifts in this unique blend of restaurant management and psychological horror.

content:
Motorcycle Mechanic Simulator 2021 is a hands-on simulation game that puts you in the shoes of a skilled motorcycle mechanic. From repairing engines to customizing bikes, this game offers a realistic and engaging experience for motorcycle enthusiasts.

In Motorcycle Mechanic Simulator 2021, you’ll manage your own workshop, take on challenging repair jobs, and restore classic bikes to their former glory. Whether you’re fixing up a vintage Harley or tuning a modern sportbike, the game offers a deep and rewarding mechanic experience.

## Key Features

### Realistic Repair Mechanics
Experience authentic motorcycle repair processes, from diagnosing issues to replacing parts and testing your work.

### Workshop Management
Run your own workshop, manage resources, and take on custom orders to grow your business.

### Bike Customization
Personalize motorcycles with a wide range of parts, colors, and accessories to create your dream ride.

### Detailed Bike Models
Work on a variety of bikes, each meticulously modeled with accurate mechanics and designs.

### Challenging Missions
Complete repair tasks with increasing difficulty, testing your skills and knowledge.

### Open-World Exploration
Take repaired bikes for a spin in a dynamic open world to ensure they’re running perfectly.

## Gameplay Overview
In Motorcycle Mechanic Simulator 2021, players start with basic repair jobs and gradually unlock more complex tasks as they progress. The game combines realistic mechanics with strategic workshop management, offering a balanced mix of creativity and challenge. Whether you’re a motorcycle enthusiast or a simulation fan, this game delivers a unique and immersive experience.

frontmatter.title: Motorcycle Mechanic Simulator 2021
frontmatter.description: Step into the world of Motorcycle Mechanic Simulator 2021, a detailed simulation game where you build, repair, and customize bikes. Master the art of motorcycle mechanics and run your own workshop in this immersive experience.

content:
Oh…Sir!! The Insult Simulator is a quirky and humorous game that turns insults into an art form. Players engage in verbal battles, crafting the wittiest comebacks to outsmart their opponents.

Set in a comedic world filled with exaggerated characters, Oh…Sir!! The Insult Simulator challenges you to think on your feet and deliver the most devastating insults. Whether playing solo or with friends, this game offers endless laughs and creativity.

## Key Features

### Dynamic Insult Crafting
Combine phrases and words to create unique insults tailored to your opponent’s weaknesses.

### Multiplayer Mayhem
Challenge friends in local multiplayer mode for a hilarious and competitive experience.

### Unique Characters
Choose from a roster of eccentric personalities, each with their own quirks and vulnerabilities.

### Comedic Writing
Enjoy witty dialogue and humorous scenarios that keep the laughs coming.

### Simple Controls
Easy-to-learn mechanics make the game accessible to players of all skill levels.

## Gameplay Overview
In Oh…Sir!! The Insult Simulator, players take turns selecting words and phrases to construct insults. The goal is to target your opponent’s weaknesses while avoiding clichés that could backfire. Each match is a test of creativity and strategy, with hilarious outcomes guaranteed. Whether playing solo or with friends, the game’s charm lies in its absurdity and wit, making it a standout title in the word game genre.

frontmatter.title: Oh…Sir!! The Insult Simulator
frontmatter.description: Oh…Sir!! The Insult Simulator is a hilarious word-based fighting game where players craft witty insults to defeat opponents. Perfect for casual fun, this comedy gem blends creativity and humor in a unique multiplayer experience.

content:
Totally Reliable Delivery Service is a chaotic and comedic multiplayer experience that turns package delivery into a laugh-out-loud adventure. With its quirky physics and cooperative gameplay, it’s perfect for players looking for a lighthearted yet challenging experience.

In Totally Reliable Delivery Service, you and your friends take on the role of delivery drivers tasked with transporting packages across a vast open world. Whether you’re riding a bike, piloting a helicopter, or driving a car, the game’s intentionally janky physics ensures every delivery is a hilarious disaster waiting to happen. The game’s sandbox nature encourages creativity and teamwork, making it a standout in the multiplayer genre.

## Key Features

### Physics-Based Chaos
Experience unpredictable and hilarious physics that turn every delivery into a unique challenge. Whether you’re flipping a car or falling off a bike, the laughs never stop.

### Multiplayer Madness
Team up with friends in online co-op mode to tackle deliveries together. Communication and coordination are key—if you can stop laughing long enough to focus.

### Vast Open World
Explore a sprawling sandbox environment filled with diverse landscapes, quirky locations, and hidden secrets. Every corner of the map offers new opportunities for fun.

### Customizable Characters
Personalize your delivery driver with a variety of outfits and accessories. Stand out from your friends with your own unique style.

### Wacky Vehicles
Choose from a wide range of vehicles, from bicycles to helicopters, each with its own quirks and challenges. Mastering their handling is half the fun.

## Gameplay Overview

Totally Reliable Delivery Service combines sandbox exploration with mission-based gameplay. Players take on delivery jobs, navigating the open world while dealing with the game’s intentionally clumsy physics. The real fun comes from playing with friends, as teamwork often devolves into chaos. Whether you’re racing to complete deliveries or just goofing around, the game offers endless entertainment and replayability.

frontmatter.title: Totally Reliable Delivery Service
frontmatter.description: Totally Reliable Delivery Service is a hilarious physics-based multiplayer game where chaos reigns supreme. Deliver packages with friends in a sprawling open world, navigating wacky vehicles and unpredictable physics for laughs and challenges.

content:
Escape Simulator brings the thrill of escape rooms to your screen. Dive into a world of challenging puzzles and immersive environments designed to test your problem-solving skills.

In Escape Simulator, you’ll step into beautifully crafted rooms, each with its own unique theme and story. From ancient temples to futuristic laboratories, every escape room offers a fresh challenge. Work solo or team up with friends in co-op mode to unravel the mysteries and escape before time runs out. The game’s interactive mechanics and attention to detail make every puzzle feel real and rewarding.

## Key Features

### Immersive Environments
Explore intricately designed escape rooms with stunning visuals and immersive atmospheres. Each room tells a unique story through its setting and details.

### Challenging Puzzles
Solve a variety of puzzles, from logic-based challenges to physical tasks. Every puzzle is designed to test your creativity and critical thinking.

### Co-op Mode
Team up with friends in online co-op mode to tackle escape rooms together. Communication and collaboration are key to solving the toughest puzzles.

### Custom Rooms
Create and share your own escape rooms using the game’s level editor. Play through community-made content for endless replayability.

### Interactive Mechanics
Pick up, examine, and manipulate objects in the environment. The game’s physics-based interactions make solving puzzles feel tactile and immersive.

## Gameplay Overview

Escape Simulator combines exploration, puzzle-solving, and teamwork in a first-person perspective. Players must carefully examine their surroundings, gather clues, and use their wits to unlock doors, disable traps, and uncover hidden passages. The game’s intuitive controls and interactive objects make it easy to dive into the action, while the challenging puzzles keep you engaged. Whether you’re playing solo or with friends, Escape Simulator offers a rewarding experience that will keep you coming back for more.

frontmatter.title: Escape Simulator
frontmatter.description: Escape Simulator is a first-person puzzle game where you explore intricately designed escape rooms. Solve puzzles, uncover secrets, and escape before time runs out in this immersive experience.

content:
This & Cats is a delightful puzzle-adventure game that combines brain-teasing challenges with the irresistible charm of cats. Perfect for casual gamers and cat lovers alike, it offers a unique blend of exploration, problem-solving, and feline fun.

In This & Cats, you embark on a whimsical journey through colorful worlds, each filled with puzzles that require the help of your furry friends. Whether it's using a cat's agility to reach high places or their curiosity to uncover hidden secrets, every level brings new surprises. The game's lighthearted tone and engaging mechanics make it a joy for players of all ages.

## Key Features

### Feline Companions
Meet a variety of cats, each with unique abilities that help you solve puzzles. From nimble climbers to curious explorers, your feline friends are key to progressing through the game.

### Creative Puzzles
Solve over 100 cleverly designed puzzles that range from simple to challenging. Each level introduces new mechanics, keeping the gameplay fresh and engaging.

### Vibrant Worlds
Explore beautifully crafted environments, from cozy living rooms to mysterious gardens. Every world is filled with hidden secrets and interactive elements.

### Relaxing Atmosphere
Enjoy a stress-free gaming experience with soothing music, charming visuals, and no time limits. Perfect for unwinding after a long day.

### Customization Options
Personalize your cats with adorable outfits and accessories. Show off your style as you progress through the game.

## Gameplay Overview

This & Cats focuses on puzzle-solving and exploration, with each level presenting new challenges that require creative thinking and the help of your feline companions. Players will navigate through various environments, using cat abilities to unlock paths, uncover hidden items, and progress through the story. The game's intuitive controls and gradual difficulty curve make it accessible to everyone, while its charming aesthetics and relaxing pace ensure a delightful experience. Whether you're a puzzle enthusiast or just love cats, This & Cats offers something special for everyone.

frontmatter.title: This & Cats
frontmatter.description: This & Cats is a charming puzzle-adventure game where players solve creative challenges alongside adorable feline companions. Explore vibrant worlds, unlock cat abilities, and enjoy a purr-fectly relaxing experience.

content:
Time Loader is a narrative-driven puzzle platformer that combines heartfelt storytelling with inventive gameplay mechanics. You play as a small robot sent back in time to change the past and prevent a tragic event.

Set in the 1990s, Time Loader immerses players in a nostalgic world filled with retro aesthetics and relatable moments. As you navigate through various environments, from suburban homes to garages, you’ll solve physics-based puzzles, interact with objects, and make choices that impact the story. The game’s time-travel theme adds depth, allowing you to explore multiple timelines and outcomes.

## Key Features

### Time-Travel Mechanics
Travel through different timelines to solve puzzles and uncover the consequences of your actions. Each decision can lead to branching story paths.

### Physics-Based Puzzles
Engage with clever puzzles that require creative thinking and precise manipulation of objects in the environment.

### Nostalgic Setting
Relive the 1990s with meticulously crafted environments, from VHS tapes to vintage toys, creating a sense of warmth and familiarity.

### Emotional Storyline
Experience a heartfelt narrative about friendship, loss, and the impact of small choices, told through the eyes of a tiny robot.

### Unique Perspective
Play from the perspective of a small robot, offering a fresh and unconventional viewpoint as you explore the world.

## Gameplay Overview

In Time Loader, you’ll control a small robot equipped with tools like a grappling hook and a magnet, which you’ll use to solve puzzles and navigate obstacles. The game emphasizes exploration and experimentation, encouraging players to think outside the box. As you progress, you’ll unlock new abilities and uncover secrets that deepen the story. With multiple endings, your choices truly matter, making each playthrough unique. Time Loader offers a blend of challenging gameplay, emotional storytelling, and nostalgic charm.

frontmatter.title: Time Loader
frontmatter.description: Time Loader is a unique puzzle platformer where you control a small time-traveling robot to alter the past and reshape the future. Experience a heartfelt story filled with nostalgia, inventive puzzles, and branching choices.

content:
Speed Crew is a thrilling co-op racing game that combines high-speed action with strategic teamwork. Gather your crew, buckle up, and prepare for a wild ride!

In Speed Crew, you and your friends form a pit crew racing against rival teams in a series of high-stakes challenges. Your goal is to not only drive fast but also repair your car mid-race, manage resources, and outsmart your opponents. With its unique blend of racing and teamwork, Speed Crew offers a fresh take on the multiplayer party genre.

## Key Features

### Team-Based Gameplay
Work together with up to four players to manage repairs, refueling, and driving, ensuring your car stays in top shape.

### Dynamic Challenges
Face unpredictable obstacles, from flat tires to engine failures, that keep every race exciting and unique.

### Customizable Cars
Upgrade and personalize your vehicle with new parts and colors to stand out on the track.

### Competitive Multiplayer
Race against other crews in fast-paced, head-to-head matches to prove your team is the best.

### Accessible Controls
Easy-to-learn mechanics make Speed Crew perfect for players of all skill levels, whether casual or competitive.

## Gameplay Overview
In Speed Crew, players take on specific roles within their team, such as driver, mechanic, or strategist. Each role is crucial to success, requiring coordination and quick thinking. Races are filled with unexpected events, forcing players to adapt on the fly. Whether you're fixing a broken axle or dodging obstacles, every moment is packed with action. With its blend of humor, strategy, and speed, Speed Crew delivers a memorable multiplayer experience that’s perfect for game nights with friends.

frontmatter.title: Speed Crew
frontmatter.description: Speed Crew is a chaotic co-op racing game where teamwork is key! Race against rivals, repair your car, and strategize with friends in this fast-paced, multiplayer party experience.

content:
Step into the world of brewing with Beer Factory, where your entrepreneurial skills are put to the test. Manage every aspect of your brewery, from raw materials to marketing, and become the ultimate beer tycoon.

Set in a vibrant, bustling city, Beer Factory challenges you to start small and grow your brewery into a global empire. Experiment with recipes, upgrade equipment, and hire skilled staff to create the finest beers. Compete with rival breweries, attend trade shows, and expand your brand to new markets.

## Key Features

### Craft Unique Beers
Discover endless possibilities by experimenting with ingredients, brewing techniques, and flavors to create signature beers that stand out.

### Manage Your Brewery
Oversee every aspect of production, from sourcing raw materials to optimizing workflows and managing finances.

### Upgrade and Expand
Invest in state-of-the-art equipment, expand your facilities, and unlock new brewing methods to increase efficiency and output.

### Compete in the Market
Analyze market trends, set competitive prices, and outmaneuver rival breweries to dominate the industry.

### Multiplayer Mode
Collaborate or compete with friends in multiplayer mode, sharing resources or battling for market supremacy.

## Gameplay Overview

Beer Factory combines strategy and creativity, offering a deep yet accessible gameplay experience. Start with a small brewery, craft your first batch, and gradually expand your operations. Balance resources, manage staff, and adapt to market demands to succeed. Whether you’re a casual player or a hardcore strategist, Beer Factory offers endless hours of fun and challenge.

frontmatter.title: Beer Factory
frontmatter.description: In Beer Factory, build and manage your brewery empire in this immersive simulation game. Craft unique beers, optimize production, and dominate the market. Perfect for fans of strategy and management games.

content:
Welcome to Home Safety Hotline, where every call could save a life. This unique simulation game puts you in charge of a hotline dedicated to helping people navigate everyday home safety challenges.

Set in a bustling city environment, Home Safety Hotline tasks players with responding to a variety of calls from concerned citizens. Whether it’s a gas leak, electrical fault, or a simple childproofing query, you’ll need to use your knowledge and quick thinking to provide accurate advice.

## Key Features

### Realistic Scenarios
Experience realistic home safety scenarios that test your problem-solving skills and knowledge.

### Interactive Tutorials
Engage with interactive tutorials that teach you essential safety tips and procedures.

### Dynamic Call System
Handle a dynamic call system where every decision impacts the outcome of the situation.

### Educational Content
Learn and teach valuable safety information that can be applied in real-life situations.

### Family-Friendly
Enjoy a family-friendly game that’s both fun and educational for players of all ages.

## Gameplay Overview

In Home Safety Hotline, players take on the role of a hotline operator. You’ll receive calls from various characters, each presenting unique safety concerns. Your job is to listen carefully, assess the situation, and provide the best possible advice.

As you progress, you’ll unlock new scenarios and challenges, each more complex than the last. The game rewards quick thinking and accurate advice, with a scoring system that tracks your performance. Whether you’re a seasoned safety expert or a curious beginner, Home Safety Hotline offers a rewarding and educational experience.

frontmatter.title: Home Safety Hotline
frontmatter.description: Home Safety Hotline is an immersive simulation game where players manage a hotline dedicated to home safety. Learn and teach vital safety tips while solving daily household hazards. Perfect for families and safety enthusiasts alike!

content:
Step into the shoes of a budding entrepreneur in *Computer Repair Shop*, where you turn a rundown tech store into a thriving business. From fixing ancient desktops to building cutting-edge gaming rigs, every day brings new challenges and opportunities.

In *Computer Repair Shop*, you'll encounter a colorful cast of customers with unique requests and malfunctioning devices. As your reputation grows, so does your workshop—unlock new tools, hire staff, and expand your services to become the go-to tech guru in town. Balance budgets, manage inventory, and keep up with the latest hardware trends in this immersive simulation.

## Key Features

### Realistic Repair Mechanics
Diagnose hardware failures, replace components, and troubleshoot software issues using authentic tools and techniques. Each repair feels like solving a satisfying puzzle.

### Customer Management
Handle demanding clients with different personalities and urgency levels. Keep them happy to earn tips and repeat business.

### Workshop Customization
Upgrade your shop with new workstations, decor, and equipment. Create an efficient layout to maximize productivity.

### Hardware Market
Buy and sell components at fluctuating prices. Hunt for bargains at auctions or salvage parts from old machines.

### Skill Progression
Level up your repair abilities to tackle more complex jobs, from data recovery to custom water-cooled builds.

## Gameplay Overview

*Computer Repair Shop* combines time management with hands-on technical challenges. Each day starts with a queue of devices needing attention—prioritize jobs based on difficulty and customer patience. Mini-games simulate actual repair processes, like carefully inserting RAM or applying thermal paste. Between repairs, manage your inventory, order new parts, and invest in shop upgrades. Random events like power surges or rush orders keep gameplay dynamic. Whether you prefer methodical repairs or fast-paced multitasking, *Computer Repair Shop* offers a rewarding blend of strategy and simulation.

frontmatter.title: Computer Repair Shop
frontmatter.description: Computer Repair Shop is a charming simulation game where you build and manage your own tech repair business. Diagnose hardware issues, upgrade PCs, and satisfy quirky customers in this addictive management experience.

content:
Landlord's Super offers a fresh take on the simulation genre, blending humor, strategy, and creativity. Set in a charming yet quirky British village, this game lets you step into the shoes of a landlord tasked with renovating, managing, and expanding your property empire.

In Landlord's Super, you’ll face a variety of challenges, from fixing leaky roofs to dealing with eccentric tenants. The game’s setting is richly detailed, capturing the essence of rural British life with a humorous twist. Whether you’re building new structures or negotiating with locals, every decision shapes your journey.

## Key Features

### Property Renovation
Restore dilapidated buildings to their former glory, tackling everything from plumbing to electrical work.

### Tenant Management
Interact with quirky tenants, each with unique personalities and demands that keep you on your toes.

### Village Exploration
Explore a vibrant village filled with colorful characters, hidden secrets, and unexpected surprises.

### Resource Management
Balance your budget, manage resources, and make strategic decisions to grow your property empire.

### Customization Options
Personalize your properties with a range of decorative and functional upgrades.

## Gameplay Overview

Landlord's Super combines hands-on building mechanics with strategic management. Players will engage in various tasks, from manual labor like hammering nails to negotiating rent with tenants. The game’s open-ended structure allows you to approach challenges in your own way, fostering creativity and experimentation. With its blend of humor, strategy, and simulation, Landlord's Super offers a uniquely engaging experience for players looking to build their dream property empire.

frontmatter.title: Landlord's Super
frontmatter.description: Landlord's Super is a unique building and management simulator where you play as a landlord renovating and managing properties in a quirky British village. Tackle challenges, interact with eccentric locals, and build your empire.

content:
Step back into the warm, inviting atmosphere of Coffee Talk, where every cup tells a story. Coffee Talk Episode 2: Hibiscus & Butterfly continues the beloved barista simulator and visual novel hybrid, blending heartfelt narratives with relaxing gameplay.

Set in an alternate Seattle where humans, elves, orcs, and other mythical beings coexist, you run a late-night café. As the barista, you’ll serve drinks, listen to your customers’ struggles, and maybe even change their lives—one cup at a time. The game expands on the original with new characters, deeper stories, and more beverage options to master.

## Key Features

### Rich, Diverse Characters
Meet a colorful cast of returning faces and new patrons, each with unique personalities and problems. Your interactions shape their stories in meaningful ways.

### Expanded Drink Crafting
Experiment with new ingredients like hibiscus and butterfly pea flower to create visually stunning and delicious drinks. Perfect your recipes to satisfy even the pickiest customers.

### Immersive Storytelling
Dive into a narrative that tackles real-world issues through a fantastical lens. Your choices and drink-making skills influence how stories unfold.

### Soothing Atmosphere
Relax with the game’s lo-fi soundtrack and pixel-art visuals, designed to evoke the comfort of a late-night café.

### Barista Tools
Use new tools like the milk frother and syrup dispenser to craft intricate beverages, adding depth to the gameplay.

## Gameplay Overview

Coffee Talk Episode 2: Hibiscus & Butterfly revolves around managing your café while engaging in conversations with customers. Each night, patrons visit with their own tales, and your role is to listen, offer advice, and serve the perfect drink. The game’s mechanics are simple but rewarding—combine ingredients to create beverages, and pay attention to your customers’ preferences to unlock special dialogue and endings. The focus is on storytelling, with a laid-back pace that encourages players to unwind and enjoy the moment.

Whether you’re a fan of the original or new to the series, this sequel offers a cozy, narrative-rich experience perfect for relaxing after a long day.

frontmatter.title: Coffee Talk Episode 2: Hibiscus & Butterfly
frontmatter.description: Coffee Talk Episode 2: Hibiscus & Butterfly is a heartwarming visual novel where you brew drinks and listen to stories in a cozy café. Serve magical beverages to fantastical customers in this narrative-driven sequel.

content:
Step into a world where art is your ultimate tool for expression and survival. Passpartout 2: The Lost Artist invites you to embark on a journey of self-discovery, creativity, and redemption.

As the titular Lost Artist, you’ll navigate a quirky art world filled with eccentric characters, unexpected challenges, and endless opportunities to create. Whether you’re painting your way out of trouble or curating exhibitions to impress critics, your artistic choices shape the story and your legacy. This unique blend of simulation and storytelling offers a fresh take on the indie game genre.

## Key Features

### Artistic Freedom
Create stunning artworks using an intuitive painting system that lets you experiment with colors, brushes, and styles. Every stroke is yours to control.

### Dynamic Storyline
Your choices matter. Engage with quirky characters, solve artistic dilemmas, and uncover the mysteries of your past in a branching narrative.

### Gallery Management
Curate exhibitions to showcase your work. Attract visitors, earn recognition, and build your reputation as a renowned artist.

### Whimsical World
Explore vibrant locations filled with charm and humor, from bustling art districts to serene countryside retreats.

### Creative Challenges
Face unique artistic trials that test your skills and push your creativity to new heights.

## Gameplay Overview

Passpartout 2: The Lost Artist combines painting mechanics with narrative-driven gameplay. Players will paint, sell, and exhibit their creations while interacting with NPCs who influence the story. The game encourages experimentation, allowing players to develop their unique artistic style. Whether you’re a seasoned artist or a beginner, the intuitive controls and engaging story make it accessible and rewarding. Dive into a world where art is more than a hobby—it’s a way of life.

frontmatter.title: Passpartout 2: The Lost Artist
frontmatter.description: In Passpartout 2: The Lost Artist, unleash your creativity in this captivating art simulation game. Craft masterpieces, explore vibrant galleries, and rediscover your artistic passion in a whimsical, story-driven adventure.

content:
Step into the shoes of a barista and experience the hustle and bustle of running your own coffee shop in Barista Simulator. From grinding beans to crafting latte art, every detail is designed to immerse you in the world of coffee.

Barista Simulator offers a relaxing yet engaging experience where you can perfect your coffee-making skills, interact with customers, and grow your café from a small corner shop to a bustling hotspot. Whether you're a coffee enthusiast or just love simulation games, this title delivers a rich and satisfying experience.

## Key Features

### Authentic Coffee Crafting
Learn to make a variety of coffee drinks, from espressos to cappuccinos, with realistic mechanics that mimic real-life brewing techniques.

### Customer Interactions
Serve a diverse cast of customers, each with unique preferences and personalities, and keep them happy to earn tips and loyalty.

### Café Customization
Decorate and upgrade your café with new equipment, furniture, and décor to create a space that reflects your style.

### Time Management
Balance speed and quality as you juggle multiple orders during peak hours, ensuring every customer leaves satisfied.

### Progression System
Unlock new recipes, skills, and upgrades as you level up, turning your humble café into a renowned coffee destination.

## Gameplay Overview

In Barista Simulator, you start with a basic setup and a handful of recipes. As you serve customers, you earn money to invest in better equipment and expand your menu. The game challenges you to manage your time efficiently while maintaining high-quality standards. With each successful day, you unlock new opportunities to grow your business and attract more customers.

The game combines simulation and strategy elements, offering a relaxing yet rewarding experience. Whether you're perfecting your latte art or experimenting with new flavors, Barista Simulator provides endless opportunities to hone your skills and build your coffee empire.

frontmatter.title: Barista Simulator
frontmatter.description: Barista Simulator lets you master the art of coffee-making in a cozy virtual café. Brew, serve, and manage your way to becoming the ultimate barista in this immersive simulation game. Perfect for coffee lovers and casual gamers alike.

content:
House Flipper 2 invites you to step into the shoes of a professional house renovator, where every project is a chance to unleash your creativity and design skills. Whether you’re flipping a cozy cottage or a sprawling mansion, the game offers a satisfying blend of challenge and relaxation.

In House Flipper 2, you’ll explore a vibrant world filled with unique properties waiting for your personal touch. From fixing leaky faucets to designing modern interiors, every task brings you closer to transforming neglected spaces into beautiful homes. The sequel introduces new tools, customization options, and a more immersive experience, making it the ultimate renovation simulator.

## What Makes House Flipper 2 Special

### Enhanced Renovation Tools
House Flipper 2 features a suite of advanced tools that make every renovation task more intuitive and satisfying. From precision painting to detailed carpentry, the controls are smoother than ever.

### Customization Galore
Personalize every aspect of your projects with a vast array of furniture, decor, and materials. Create unique interiors that reflect your style and vision.

### Diverse Property Listings
Choose from a variety of properties, each with its own challenges and potential. Whether it’s a fixer-upper or a luxury estate, every flip is a new adventure.

### Relaxing Gameplay
Enjoy a calming experience as you work through tasks at your own pace. House Flipper 2 is perfect for unwinding after a long day.

### Sandbox Mode
Unleash your creativity in Sandbox Mode, where you can design and decorate without limits. Experiment with bold ideas and create dream homes.

## Gameplay Overview
House Flipper 2 combines meticulous renovation tasks with creative freedom. Players start by selecting a property, assessing its needs, and diving into repairs, cleaning, and decorating. The game rewards attention to detail, allowing you to earn money and unlock new tools and items as you progress. With its intuitive mechanics and endless customization options, House Flipper 2 offers a deeply engaging experience for both casual players and design enthusiasts.

frontmatter.title: House Flipper 2
frontmatter.description: House Flipper 2 is a captivating simulation game where you transform rundown properties into stunning homes. Perfect for fans of renovation and creative design, this sequel offers enhanced tools and endless possibilities to craft your dream spaces.

minimum.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1050 / AMD Radeon RX 560

recommended.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 2060 / AMD Radeon RX 5700

content:
Mon Bazou is a unique sandbox game that blends automotive simulation with open-world exploration. Set in a quirky Canadian-inspired town, it challenges players to build, maintain, and customize their dream car while navigating the chaos of daily life.

In Mon Bazou, you’ll scavenge for parts, manage your finances, and interact with eccentric characters in a charmingly rustic setting. The game emphasizes creativity and problem-solving as you transform a rusty junker into a personalized masterpiece. With its humorous tone and immersive mechanics, Mon Bazou offers a one-of-a-kind experience for car enthusiasts and sandbox fans alike.

## Key Features

### Open-World Exploration
Explore a vast, quirky Canadian-inspired town filled with unique locations, hidden treasures, and eccentric NPCs to interact with.

### Car Customization
Build and customize your dream car from scratch, scavenging for parts and upgrading your vehicle to suit your style and needs.

### Resource Management
Manage your finances, fuel, and spare parts to keep your car running smoothly while balancing other responsibilities.

### Humorous Tone
Enjoy a lighthearted and humorous narrative filled with quirky characters and unexpected events that add charm to the gameplay.

### Dynamic Challenges
Face unpredictable challenges like breakdowns, fuel shortages, and weather conditions that test your problem-solving skills.

## Gameplay Overview

Mon Bazou combines sandbox freedom with simulation depth, allowing players to shape their own automotive adventure. Start with a rusty car and gradually transform it into a reliable machine by scavenging parts, completing tasks, and earning money. The game encourages creativity, as players can customize their car’s appearance and functionality while exploring the open world. With its blend of humor, resource management, and exploration, Mon Bazou offers a refreshing take on the simulation genre, appealing to both casual and dedicated gamers.

frontmatter.title: Mon Bazou
frontmatter.description: Mon Bazou is a quirky sandbox simulation game where you build, customize, and maintain your dream car in a quirky Canadian-inspired open world. Explore, scavenge, and embrace the chaos of car ownership.

content:
Hobo: Tough Life drops players into the shoes of a homeless person fighting for survival in a merciless urban environment. This hardcore survival RPG combines realistic mechanics with deep role-playing elements for a uniquely challenging experience.

Set in the fictional city of Praslav, Hobo: Tough Life captures the brutal reality of homelessness with startling authenticity. Players must navigate complex social hierarchies among the homeless population while battling hunger, cold, and illness. The game's dynamic weather system and day-night cycle create constantly shifting challenges that demand careful planning and adaptation.

## Key Features

### Realistic Survival Mechanics
Manage hunger, thirst, fatigue, body temperature, and health while contending with seasonal changes that dramatically affect survival strategies.

### Complex Social System
Interact with various homeless factions, build relationships through favors, and navigate the delicate balance between cooperation and competition on the streets.

### Deep Crafting System
Salvage materials from dumpsters and abandoned buildings to create essential survival gear, from makeshift weapons to weatherproof clothing.

### Dynamic Urban Sandbox
Explore a fully realized city with NPCs following their own schedules, changing weather conditions, and emergent opportunities for resource gathering.

### Morality System
Choose whether to survive through begging, stealing, or honest work, with each approach affecting your reputation and available opportunities.

## Gameplay Overview

Hobo: Tough Life challenges players to survive as long as possible through a harsh winter. Each day presents new obstacles - finding shelter from the cold, locating food sources, and avoiding dangerous encounters. The game features permadeath, making every decision critically important.

Players can specialize their character through various skills like scavenging, persuasion, or combat. The open-ended design allows for multiple survival strategies, whether forming alliances with other homeless characters or going it alone. Seasonal changes force constant adaptation, with winter being particularly deadly without proper preparation.

frontmatter.title: Hobo: Tough Life
frontmatter.description: Hobo: Tough Life is a gritty survival RPG where you play as a homeless person struggling to survive the harsh streets of a fictional city. Scavenge, beg, steal, and form alliances to endure winter's brutality in this unforgiving urban sandbox.

content:
Longvinter is a multiplayer survival game that immerses players in a vibrant and unpredictable open world. With a focus on crafting, exploration, and player interaction, it offers a unique blend of survival mechanics and social gameplay.

In Longvinter, players are thrust into a colorful island teeming with wildlife, resources, and other players. The game encourages you to hunt, fish, and gather materials to craft tools, weapons, and shelter. What sets Longvinter apart is its dynamic environment where players can form alliances, trade, or compete for resources, creating endless possibilities for emergent gameplay.

## Key Features

### Open World Exploration
Explore a vast and vibrant island filled with diverse biomes, wildlife, and hidden secrets. Every corner of the world offers something new to discover.

### Crafting and Building
Gather resources to craft tools, weapons, and structures. Build your own base to protect your belongings and survive the challenges of the island.

### Multiplayer Interaction
Interact with other players in real-time. Form alliances, trade resources, or engage in friendly (or not-so-friendly) competition.

### Dynamic Economy
Participate in a player-driven economy where resources and items gain value based on supply and demand. Trade wisely to thrive.

### Seasonal Events
Experience seasonal changes and special events that bring new challenges and rewards to the island.

## Gameplay Overview

Longvinter’s core gameplay revolves around survival, exploration, and player interaction. Start with nothing and gradually build your way up by gathering resources, crafting essential items, and establishing a base. The game’s open-ended nature allows you to choose your path—whether you want to focus on hunting, fishing, trading, or even engaging in PvP combat. The ever-changing world and player-driven economy ensure that no two sessions are the same, making Longvinter a truly dynamic and engaging experience.

frontmatter.title: Longvinter
frontmatter.description: Longvinter is a multiplayer survival game set in a vibrant open world. Hunt, fish, craft, and build your way to survival while interacting with other players in this dynamic and unpredictable environment.

content:
My Dream Setup is a relaxing and creative simulation game that lets you design your ideal workspace, gaming station, or cozy corner. Whether you're a streamer, gamer, or just love to decorate, this game offers endless possibilities to express your style.

In My Dream Setup, you start with a blank canvas and transform it into your dream space. Choose from thousands of furniture items, tech gadgets, and decor pieces to create a setup that reflects your personality. The game combines the satisfaction of interior design with the thrill of tech customization, making it a unique experience for creative minds.

## Key Features

### Endless Customization
With a vast library of items, you can mix and match furniture, lighting, and tech to create a setup that’s uniquely yours. From RGB-lit gaming rigs to minimalist workspaces, the choices are limitless.

### Realistic Design Tools
Use intuitive tools to place, rotate, and adjust items with precision. The game’s physics engine ensures everything looks and feels realistic, from cable management to ergonomic chair adjustments.

### Share Your Creations
Show off your dream setup to the community! Upload your designs, browse others’ creations, and get inspired by the most creative setups from around the world.

### Relaxing Atmosphere
Enjoy a stress-free experience with calming music and a soothing color palette. My Dream Setup is perfect for unwinding after a long day.

## Gameplay Overview

My Dream Setup focuses on creativity and relaxation. You’ll start with a basic room and gradually unlock new items and customization options as you progress. The game encourages experimentation, allowing you to tweak every detail until your setup feels just right.

Whether you’re designing a high-end gaming station or a cozy reading nook, My Dream Setup offers a satisfying blend of creativity and simulation. The game’s intuitive controls make it easy for anyone to dive in and start designing, while the depth of customization ensures there’s always something new to discover.

frontmatter.title: My Dream Setup
frontmatter.description: My Dream Setup is a creative simulation game where you design and customize your perfect workspace, gaming rig, or cozy nook. Unleash your inner designer with endless customization options and create the ultimate dream setup.

content:
Flyout invites players to embark on a thrilling journey through a beautifully crafted open world. From soaring through dynamic skies to uncovering hidden secrets, this game offers an unparalleled adventure.

Set in a sprawling, ever-changing landscape, Flyout challenges players to navigate treacherous terrains, engage in heart-pounding combat, and forge their own path. The game’s unique sandbox mechanics allow for endless creativity, whether you’re crafting powerful gear or building your own settlements.

## Key Features

### Vast Open World
Explore a massive, dynamic world filled with diverse biomes, ancient ruins, and hidden treasures waiting to be discovered.

### Dynamic Flight Mechanics
Master intuitive flight controls that let you soar through the skies, perform aerial stunts, and engage in thrilling dogfights.

### Sandbox Creativity
Craft, build, and customize your own gear, vehicles, and settlements to create a unique gameplay experience.

### Multiplayer Exploration
Team up with friends or compete against rivals in a shared world where cooperation and strategy are key to survival.

### Engaging Storyline
Unravel a deep, immersive narrative filled with intriguing characters, moral choices, and unexpected twists.

## Gameplay Overview
Flyout combines exploration, combat, and creativity into one seamless experience. Players can traverse the world on foot or take to the skies, using their skills to overcome challenges and uncover secrets. The game’s sandbox mechanics encourage experimentation, allowing you to craft unique solutions to problems or build elaborate structures. Whether you’re battling fierce enemies, teaming up with friends, or exploring the vast landscape, Flyout offers endless opportunities for adventure and discovery.

frontmatter.title: Flyout
frontmatter.description: Flyout is an action-adventure game that immerses players in a vast open world filled with danger, mystery, and endless exploration. Soar through dynamic skies, uncover hidden secrets, and craft your destiny in this epic sandbox experience.

content:
Welcome to the world of Volcano Princess, where fire and strategy collide in an unforgettable RPG experience.

In Volcano Princess, you play as the heir to a volcanic kingdom, tasked with managing resources, forging alliances, and harnessing the power of the volcano to ensure your realm thrives. Set in a richly detailed fantasy world, this game combines strategy, simulation, and role-playing elements to create a truly unique adventure. Your decisions shape the fate of your kingdom, and every choice has consequences.

## Key Features

### Volcanic Kingdom Management
Build and expand your kingdom atop a living volcano, balancing resource management with the ever-present threat of eruptions.

### Dynamic Alliances
Forge alliances with neighboring kingdoms, negotiate treaties, and navigate complex political landscapes to secure your rule.

### Elemental Magic
Harness the power of the volcano to unlock unique elemental abilities, shaping your kingdom's destiny with fire and lava.

### Customizable Characters
Create and customize your ruler, choosing from a variety of traits, skills, and appearances to reflect your playstyle.

### Strategic Combat
Engage in tactical battles against enemies, using terrain and volcanic powers to gain the upper hand.

### Rich Narrative
Experience a deep, branching story filled with memorable characters, moral dilemmas, and unexpected twists.

## Gameplay Overview

Volcano Princess combines kingdom-building mechanics with strategic decision-making and RPG elements. Players must manage resources, construct buildings, and develop their kingdom while navigating alliances, diplomacy, and occasional volcanic eruptions. The game features a mix of turn-based combat, exploration, and narrative-driven choices, ensuring a varied and engaging experience. Whether you're strategizing for survival or shaping the future of your realm, Volcano Princess offers endless possibilities for adventure and creativity.

frontmatter.title: Volcano Princess
frontmatter.description: Volcano Princess is a captivating fantasy RPG where you build and manage a kingdom atop a fiery volcano. Strategize, forge alliances, and harness volcanic power to thrive in this unique simulation adventure.

content:
Cuisineer blends restaurant management with dungeon-crawling RPG action in a vibrant fantasy world. As a budding chef, you’ll hunt for ingredients, cook mouthwatering dishes, and serve hungry customers while uncovering a rich narrative.

In Cuisineer, you play as Pom, a young chef who inherits a run-down restaurant in the whimsical town of Paell. To revive the business, you’ll venture into dangerous dungeons to gather rare ingredients, battle quirky monsters, and perfect your culinary skills. The game combines fast-paced combat with deep cooking mechanics, offering a fresh take on both RPG and simulation genres.

## Key Features

### Dungeon Delving for Ingredients
Explore procedurally generated dungeons filled with monsters and treasures. Each biome offers unique ingredients, from fiery peppers in volcanic caves to rare truffles in enchanted forests.

### Restaurant Management
Build and customize your restaurant, hire staff, and design a menu that keeps customers coming back. Balance speed, quality, and profit to earn fame and expand your business.

### Deep Cooking System
Master hundreds of recipes, experiment with ingredients, and unlock special dishes with powerful buffs. The more you cook, the more your culinary reputation grows.

### Engaging Combat
Fight monsters using kitchen utensils and magical abilities. Upgrade your gear and learn new skills to take on tougher challenges.

### Charming Storyline
Meet quirky characters, solve town mysteries, and uncover the secrets of Paell. Your choices affect relationships and the world around you.

## Gameplay Overview

Cuisineer’s gameplay loops between managing your restaurant by day and exploring dungeons by night. During the day, you’ll prep ingredients, serve customers, and upgrade your kitchen. At night, you’ll brave dungeons to gather supplies, fighting monsters in real-time combat. The game rewards creativity—experiment with recipes to discover powerful dishes that aid in battles. With its blend of cozy simulation and action-packed adventure, Cuisineer offers a uniquely satisfying experience for foodies and RPG fans alike.

frontmatter.title: Cuisineer
frontmatter.description: Cuisineer is a charming RPG-cooking sim hybrid where you run a restaurant, explore dungeons for ingredients, and battle monsters. Master recipes, manage your eatery, and uncover secrets in this deliciously unique adventure.

minimum.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 660 / AMD Radeon HD 7850

recommended.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1060 / AMD Radeon RX 580

content:
Old School transports players to a bygone era of gaming, where pixel art meets immersive storytelling. This retro-inspired RPG offers a rich narrative, expansive exploration, and deep character customization.

Step into a vibrant, pixelated world filled with mysteries and challenges. Old School combines classic RPG mechanics with modern design, offering a unique experience for both nostalgic gamers and newcomers. Embark on an epic journey to uncover ancient secrets and shape your destiny.

## Key Features

### Vast Open World
Explore diverse landscapes, from bustling towns to eerie dungeons, each brimming with secrets and side quests.

### Character Customization
Create and evolve your hero with unique skills, abilities, and equipment tailored to your playstyle.

### Engaging Storyline
Immerse yourself in a rich narrative filled with memorable characters, moral choices, and unexpected twists.

### Retro Pixel Art
Relive the charm of classic gaming with beautifully crafted pixel art visuals and animations.

### Strategic Combat
Master turn-based battles that require careful planning and tactical decision-making.

## Gameplay Overview
Old School combines exploration, combat, and storytelling into a seamless experience. Players will traverse a sprawling world, interact with NPCs, and engage in strategic battles. The game’s progression system allows for deep customization, ensuring every playthrough feels unique. With its blend of nostalgia and innovation, Old School offers a fresh take on the RPG genre.

frontmatter.title: Old School
frontmatter.description: Old School is a nostalgic RPG adventure blending pixel art aesthetics with deep storytelling. Explore a vast world, customize your character, and uncover secrets in this retro-inspired masterpiece.

content:
Step into the whimsical world of Lemon Cake, a delightful bakery simulation game where you can turn your passion for baking into a thriving business. With its charming visuals and relaxing gameplay, this title is perfect for players looking for a cozy and rewarding experience.

In Lemon Cake, you take on the role of a budding baker tasked with restoring a once-famous bakery to its former glory. Grow your ingredients, experiment with recipes, and serve a variety of mouthwatering desserts to your customers. The game combines farming, cooking, and management elements to create a unique and engaging experience. Whether you're decorating your bakery or perfecting your lemon cake recipe, there’s always something sweet to do.

## Key Features

### Bakery Management
Run and upgrade your bakery, from decorating the space to optimizing workflows to keep customers happy.

### Ingredient Farming
Grow fresh ingredients like lemons, strawberries, and herbs in your garden to use in your recipes.

### Recipe Crafting
Experiment with over 20 recipes, from classic lemon cakes to creative pastries, and unlock new ones as you progress.

### Relaxing Gameplay
Enjoy a stress-free experience with charming visuals, soothing music, and no time limits.

### Customer Interaction
Serve a variety of quirky customers, each with their own preferences and stories.

## Gameplay Overview
Lemon Cake blends farming, cooking, and management into a seamless gameplay loop. Start by planting and harvesting ingredients in your garden, then head to the kitchen to craft delicious desserts.
