Gather materials, craft tools, and upgrade your equipment to expand your graveyard and unlock new possibilities.

### Strange Characters
Meet a cast of quirky NPCs, each with their own stories, quests, and moral dilemmas to navigate.

### Dark Humor
Enjoy a unique tone filled with macabre humor, satirical commentary, and unexpected twists.

### Exploration
Discover a vast world filled with secrets, dungeons, and resources to aid your graveyard-building efforts.

### Moral Choices
Make decisions that impact your graveyard, relationships, and the world around you.

## Gameplay Overview
Graveyard Keeper combines resource management, crafting, and RPG elements into a cohesive and engaging experience. Players must balance tasks like digging graves, harvesting organs, and crafting tools while managing their time and resources efficiently. The game’s dark humor and moral choices add depth, encouraging players to explore multiple playstyles and outcomes. Whether you’re optimizing your graveyard, uncovering secrets, or interacting with NPCs, Graveyard Keeper offers a unique and memorable gameplay experience.

frontmatter.title: Graveyard Keeper
frontmatter.description: Graveyard Keeper is a darkly humorous simulation RPG where you manage a medieval cemetery. Build, craft, and explore in a quirky world filled with macabre tasks and moral dilemmas. Perfect for fans of resource management and storytelling.

content:
Step into the shoes of a master blacksmith in Anvil Saga, where every hammer strike shapes your destiny. Craft legendary weapons, manage your forge, and build a thriving business in a medieval world brimming with challenges and opportunities.

In Anvil Saga, you’ll start with a humble forge and a dream. As you progress, you’ll unlock new crafting techniques, hire skilled workers, and fulfill orders for knights, adventurers, and nobles. The game’s dynamic economy and evolving world ensure no two playthroughs are the same.

## Key Features

### Dynamic Crafting System
Create unique weapons and armor by experimenting with materials, designs, and forging techniques. Each item’s quality and traits depend on your craftsmanship.

### Resource Management
Manage resources like ore, wood, and coal while balancing production costs and customer demands. Expand your workshop to increase efficiency.

### Medieval Economy
Interact with a living economy where prices fluctuate based on supply, demand, and world events. Strategize to maximize profits.

### Character Progression
Hire and train apprentices, each with unique skills and personalities. Develop your blacksmith’s abilities to unlock advanced crafting options.

### Immersive World
Explore a richly detailed medieval world filled with quests, rivalries, and opportunities. Your decisions shape your reputation and forge’s legacy.

## Gameplay Overview

Anvil Saga blends crafting, strategy, and management into a seamless experience. Players start by forging simple tools and gradually unlock complex designs for swords, shields, and armor. Balancing production, finances, and customer satisfaction is key to success.

The game’s immersive world reacts to your choices. Will you cater to noble patrons or arm rebellious peasants? Your forge becomes a hub of activity, influencing the fate of the realm. With its engaging mechanics and rich storytelling, Anvil Saga offers endless replayability for fans of simulation and strategy games.

frontmatter.title: Anvil Saga
frontmatter.description: Anvil Saga is a medieval crafting and management simulation game where you build and run your own blacksmith shop. Forge legendary weapons, manage resources, and expand your empire in a rich, immersive world.

content:
Arcade Paradise offers a refreshing twist on the management simulation genre, blending retro gaming nostalgia with entrepreneurial challenges.

In Arcade Paradise, you step into the shoes of Ashley, who inherits a rundown laundromat from their father. Instead of sticking to washing clothes, you decide to turn the space into the ultimate arcade paradise. The game combines the thrill of managing a business with the joy of playing retro-inspired arcade games, creating a unique and engaging experience.

## Key Features

### Retro Arcade Games
Discover and play over 35 original arcade games, each with its own unique mechanics and retro charm.

### Business Management
Manage your arcade empire by upgrading machines, attracting customers, and optimizing your space for maximum profit.

### Customizable Layout
Rearrange and decorate your arcade to create the perfect gaming haven, tailored to your vision.

### Engaging Storyline
Follow Ashley’s journey from laundromat operator to arcade mogul through a compelling narrative filled with humor and heart.

### Sandbox Freedom
Enjoy the freedom to experiment with different strategies and arcade layouts without strict time constraints.

## Gameplay Overview

Arcade Paradise blends simulation and arcade gaming seamlessly. By day, you’ll manage your arcade, upgrading machines, cleaning up, and keeping customers happy. By night, you can dive into the arcade games themselves, mastering each one to unlock new features and earn more money. The game encourages creativity and strategy, allowing you to grow your arcade at your own pace while enjoying a rich, nostalgic atmosphere.

frontmatter.title: Arcade Paradise
frontmatter.description: Arcade Paradise is a unique simulation game where you transform a laundromat into a thriving arcade empire. Manage, upgrade, and play retro arcade games in this nostalgic sandbox experience.

content:
Step into the shoes of a struggling artist in *Passpartout: The Starving Artist*, a charming simulation game that blends creativity with strategy. Will you create masterpieces or sell out to survive?

Set in a quirky art world, *Passpartout: The Starving Artist* challenges you to paint your way to fame and fortune. From humble beginnings in a tiny studio, you’ll need to balance artistic integrity with the demands of buyers and critics. Can you become the next big thing or will you starve trying?

The game’s whimsical setting and humorous tone make it a delightful experience. As you paint, sell, and upgrade your studio, you’ll encounter quirky characters and face tough decisions about your art career.

## Key Features

### Artistic Freedom
Create your own paintings using a simple yet intuitive painting tool. Let your creativity run wild and see how the art world reacts.

### Dynamic Economy
Sell your art to a variety of buyers, each with their own tastes and budgets. Adjust your prices and style to maximize profits.

### Studio Upgrades
Expand your studio and unlock new tools to enhance your artistic capabilities. From better canvases to new brushes, every upgrade makes a difference.

### Quirky Characters
Meet eccentric art collectors, snobby critics, and other unique personalities who shape your journey. Their feedback can make or break your career.

### Multiple Endings
Your choices determine your fate. Will you become a celebrated artist, a commercial sellout, or a starving failure?

## Gameplay Overview

In *Passpartout: The Starving Artist*, you’ll spend your days painting, selling, and managing your studio. The painting mechanics are easy to learn but offer endless possibilities for creativity. Each painting you create can be sold to buyers, and their reactions will guide your artistic path.

As you progress, you’ll face challenges like balancing artistic integrity with commercial success. The game’s humor and charm make every decision feel meaningful, and the multiple endings add replayability. Whether you’re a seasoned artist or a casual player, *Passpartout: The Starving Artist* offers a unique and engaging experience.

frontmatter.title: Passpartout: The Starving Artist
frontmatter.description: Passpartout: The Starving Artist is a unique art simulation game where you play as a struggling artist trying to make a name in the competitive art world. Create, sell, and survive!

content:
Step into the world of My Garage, where your automotive dreams come to life. This simulation game offers a unique blend of creativity, management, and sandbox gameplay, making it a must-play for car enthusiasts and casual gamers alike.

In My Garage, you take on the role of a garage owner, tasked with building and customizing your space to perfection. Whether you're restoring vintage cars, designing a state-of-the-art workshop, or managing day-to-day operations, the game offers endless opportunities for creativity and strategy. Set in a vibrant, open-world environment, My Garage challenges you to balance your resources while expanding your automotive empire.

## Key Features

### Customizable Garage
Design and personalize every inch of your garage. From the layout to the decor, create a space that reflects your unique style.

### Car Restoration
Restore classic cars to their former glory. Scavenge for parts, repair damages, and customize each vehicle to make it truly your own.

### Resource Management
Manage your resources wisely. Balance your budget, hire staff, and invest in upgrades to keep your garage running smoothly.

### Open-World Exploration
Explore a vast open world filled with hidden treasures, rare car parts, and exciting challenges. Discover new locations and unlock exclusive content.

### Multiplayer Mode
Team up with friends in multiplayer mode. Collaborate on projects, trade resources, and compete in challenges to see who can build the ultimate garage.

## Gameplay Overview

My Garage combines simulation and sandbox elements to deliver a rich and immersive experience. Players start with a basic garage and gradually expand their operations by completing tasks, restoring cars, and upgrading their facilities. The game's open-world environment encourages exploration, while the resource management aspect adds a layer of strategy. Whether you're a car enthusiast or a casual gamer, My Garage offers something for everyone. Dive in and start building your dream garage today!

frontmatter.title: My Garage
frontmatter.description: My Garage is a captivating simulation game where you build, customize, and manage your dream garage. Dive into a sandbox world filled with endless possibilities, from restoring classic cars to designing the ultimate workshop. Perfect for casual gamers and creative minds alike.

content:
Step into a dark, twisted world where every decision could mean life or death. 'Who Must Die?' challenges players to confront their deepest fears and make impossible choices in a harrowing survival experience.

Set in a decaying mansion shrouded in mystery, 'Who Must Die?' pits you against both supernatural horrors and the darker side of human nature. As one of five strangers trapped in this sinister estate, you must uncover its secrets while deciding who among you can be trusted—and who must be sacrificed to escape alive. The game blends stealth, exploration, and narrative-driven gameplay to create a uniquely terrifying experience.

## Key Features

### Haunting Atmosphere
Immerse yourself in a meticulously crafted environment filled with eerie sounds, unsettling visuals, and a sense of dread that lingers around every corner.

### Moral Dilemmas
Face heart-wrenching decisions that test your ethics and shape the story’s outcome. Every choice has consequences, and no one is truly safe.

### Dynamic AI
Encounter unpredictable NPCs who react to your actions, making each playthrough unique. Trust no one—your allies may become your enemies.

### Stealth Mechanics
Use cunning and strategy to evade deadly threats. Hide, distract, and outwit your pursuers to survive.

### Multiple Endings
Your choices determine the fate of the characters and the story. Replay to uncover all possible outcomes.

## Gameplay Overview

In 'Who Must Die?', gameplay revolves around exploration, puzzle-solving, and decision-making. Scavenge for resources, solve intricate puzzles, and navigate the mansion’s labyrinthine halls while avoiding deadly traps and enemies. The game emphasizes tension and immersion, with limited resources and constant danger forcing you to think carefully about every move. The narrative unfolds through environmental storytelling, interactions with other characters, and branching dialogue options. Whether you choose to cooperate, betray, or sacrifice others, the game ensures a gripping and unforgettable experience.

frontmatter.title: Who Must Die?
frontmatter.description: In 'Who Must Die?', a chilling psychological survival horror game, you must navigate a deadly mansion filled with traps, secrets, and moral dilemmas. Can you survive—and decide who deserves to live?

content:
Mr. President! is a gripping political simulation game that puts you in the shoes of the leader of the free world. Experience the challenges and triumphs of running a nation, making critical decisions, and shaping the future.

In Mr. President!, you’ll face a dynamic world filled with political intrigue, global crises, and moral dilemmas. From managing the economy to negotiating with foreign leaders, every choice you make will have far-reaching consequences. The game offers a realistic yet accessible take on governance, blending strategy and storytelling to immerse you in the role of the President.

## Key Features

### Dynamic Decision-Making
Navigate complex scenarios where every choice impacts your nation’s economy, reputation, and global standing. Balance competing interests to stay in power.

### Realistic Political Simulation
Experience a meticulously crafted political system with evolving public opinion, media influence, and unpredictable world events.

### Crisis Management
Respond to emergencies like natural disasters, terrorist attacks, and economic downturns. Your leadership skills will be put to the test.

### Diplomatic Relations
Forge alliances, negotiate treaties, and handle international conflicts. Your diplomacy skills can shape the course of history.

### Customizable Policies
Craft policies on healthcare, education, defense, and more to reflect your vision for the nation.

## Gameplay Overview
Mr. President! combines strategy and role-playing elements to create a unique gameplay experience. Manage your cabinet, address the nation, and make decisions that will define your legacy. The game features a branching narrative with multiple outcomes, ensuring no two playthroughs are the same. Whether you focus on domestic reform or global dominance, the power is in your hands. Prepare to lead, inspire, and confront the challenges of being Mr. President!

frontmatter.title: Mr. President!
frontmatter.description: Step into the Oval Office with Mr. President!, a captivating political simulation game where you navigate diplomacy, crises, and decision-making. Shape history and lead your nation to greatness.

content:
Stacklands is a delightful blend of strategy and card-based gameplay, offering a fresh take on village-building simulations. Players stack cards to gather resources, craft items, and grow their settlement into a thriving community.

In Stacklands, you’ll start with a few basic cards and gradually build your village by combining resources and solving puzzles. The game’s intuitive mechanics make it easy to pick up, but its depth ensures hours of engaging gameplay. Whether you’re farming, fighting monsters, or expanding your settlement, Stacklands offers a unique and rewarding experience.

## Key Features

### Card-Based Village Building
Build your village by stacking cards to gather resources and craft items. Each card represents a different element of your settlement, from trees to houses.

### Resource Management
Strategically manage resources to ensure your village thrives. Gather food, wood, and stone to craft tools and expand your community.

### Combat System
Defend your village from monsters by crafting weapons and training villagers. Combat adds an exciting layer of challenge to the game.

### Sandbox Exploration
Explore procedurally generated maps to discover new resources and challenges. Each playthrough offers a unique experience.

### Crafting System
Combine resources to craft tools, buildings, and other items. Experiment with different combinations to unlock new possibilities.

## Gameplay Overview

Stacklands combines resource management, strategy, and card-based mechanics into a seamless gameplay experience. Players start with a small deck of cards and gradually expand their village by stacking and combining resources. The game’s intuitive design makes it easy to learn, but its depth ensures endless replayability. Whether you’re farming, crafting, or fighting off monsters, Stacklands offers a charming and engaging experience for players of all skill levels.

frontmatter.title: Stacklands
frontmatter.description: Stacklands is a unique village-building card game where you stack cards to gather resources, craft items, and expand your settlement. Combine strategy and creativity in this charming sandbox survival experience.

content:
Sailwind is a captivating sailing simulation game that transports players to a world of endless seas and hidden treasures. With its focus on exploration, trade, and survival, Sailwind offers a unique and immersive maritime experience.

Set in a beautifully crafted open world, Sailwind challenges you to master the art of sailing while navigating treacherous waters, discovering remote islands, and trading goods across bustling ports. Whether you're a seasoned sailor or a newcomer to the seas, Sailwind’s realistic mechanics and serene atmosphere make it a truly unforgettable journey.

## Key Features

### Realistic Sailing Mechanics
Experience authentic sailing with wind, currents, and weather affecting your journey. Every decision counts as you navigate the open seas.

### Dynamic Trading System
Buy low, sell high! Trade goods across ports to build your wealth and upgrade your ship for better voyages.

### Exploration and Discovery
Uncover hidden islands, ancient ruins, and secret treasures as you chart your course through uncharted waters.

### Customizable Ships
Upgrade and personalize your vessel to suit your playstyle, from speed-focused cutters to sturdy cargo ships.

### Relaxing Atmosphere
Immerse yourself in a tranquil world with stunning visuals and soothing soundscapes, perfect for unwinding after a long day.

## Gameplay Overview
Sailwind combines survival, exploration, and trading into a seamless gameplay experience. Players will manage resources, plan routes, and adapt to changing conditions while sailing across vast oceans. The game’s open-ended nature allows you to set your own goals, whether it’s becoming a master trader, an intrepid explorer, or simply enjoying the peaceful rhythm of life at sea. With its blend of realism and relaxation, Sailwind offers a refreshing take on the simulation genre.

frontmatter.title: Sailwind
frontmatter.description: Sailwind is a serene sailing simulation game where you navigate vast open waters, trade goods, and explore uncharted islands. Immerse yourself in a realistic maritime adventure with stunning visuals and tranquil gameplay.

content:
Wobbly Life is a charming and chaotic sandbox adventure that lets players embrace their inner wobbliness in a vibrant, physics-driven world. Whether you're exploring, working odd jobs, or just causing mayhem, every moment is filled with laughter and unpredictability.

In Wobbly Life, you step into the shoes of a wobbly character navigating a colorful open world. The game combines elements of simulation, adventure, and comedy as you take on various jobs, from pizza delivery to firefighting, or simply roam around causing hilarious physics-based mishaps. With its cooperative multiplayer mode, you can share the fun with friends and family, making it a perfect game for all ages.

## Key Features

### Physics-Based Wobbliness
Every movement in Wobbly Life is governed by its unique physics system, making even simple tasks like walking or driving hilariously unpredictable. The wobbly characters and objects add a layer of comedy to every interaction.

### Open-World Exploration
The game features a vast, vibrant world filled with diverse environments, from bustling cities to serene beaches. Each area offers unique activities, secrets, and opportunities for fun.

### Variety of Jobs and Activities
Take on over 20 different jobs, each with its own mini-games and challenges. Whether you're a police officer, a construction worker, or a farmer, there's always something new to try.

### Co-Op Multiplayer
Team up with friends in local or online co-op mode to tackle jobs, explore the world, or just mess around together. The more wobblies, the merrier!

### Customizable Characters
Personalize your wobbly character with a wide range of clothing, accessories, and colors. Stand out from the crowd with your unique style.

## Gameplay Overview

Wobbly Life offers a blend of structured objectives and free-form sandbox play. Players can choose to follow job-based missions or simply explore the world at their own pace. The game's physics engine ensures that no two playthroughs are the same, as even the simplest actions can lead to unexpected and amusing outcomes. Whether you're driving a wobbly car, attempting to complete a task, or just goofing off with friends, Wobbly Life delivers endless entertainment and laughter.

frontmatter.title: Wobbly Life
frontmatter.description: Wobbly Life is a hilarious open-world sandbox game where you play as a wobbly character exploring, working odd jobs, and causing chaos in a vibrant physics-driven world. Perfect for solo or co-op fun!

content:
Moving Out is a quirky and hilarious co-op game that turns furniture moving into a chaotic adventure. Perfect for parties or casual gaming sessions, it’s packed with laughs and challenges.

In Moving Out, you and your friends take on the role of Furniture Arrangement & Relocation Technicians (F.A.R.T.s). Your mission? Move furniture out of increasingly bizarre houses while navigating obstacles, tight deadlines, and unexpected surprises. The game’s whimsical setting and over-the-top scenarios make it a standout in the party game genre.

## Key Features

### Chaotic Co-op Gameplay
Work together with up to four players to move furniture efficiently—or hilariously fail in the process. Teamwork is key, but chaos is inevitable.

### Quirky Levels
Explore a variety of unique environments, from haunted houses to farms with rampaging chickens. Each level introduces new challenges and surprises.

### Customizable Difficulty
Tailor the game to your group’s skill level with adjustable settings. Whether you’re a casual player or a perfectionist, Moving Out has something for everyone.

### Hilarious Physics
Enjoy the game’s exaggerated physics as you toss furniture, smash windows, and send couches flying. Every move is a potential comedy moment.

### Progression and Unlockables
Unlock new characters, outfits, and levels as you progress. Keep things fresh with new content and challenges.

## Gameplay Overview
Moving Out combines simulation and puzzle-solving with a heavy dose of humor. Players must strategize to move furniture quickly while navigating obstacles like narrow hallways, moving platforms, and mischievous animals. The game emphasizes creativity and improvisation—sometimes the fastest solution isn’t the most conventional. With its accessible controls and focus on fun, Moving Out is perfect for gamers of all ages and skill levels.

frontmatter.title: Moving Out
frontmatter.description: Moving Out is a chaotic co-op simulation game where you and your friends become furniture-moving experts. Navigate quirky challenges and hilarious obstacles in this laugh-out-loud party game.

content:
Madison is a spine-chilling psychological horror game that pushes players to their limits. With its immersive first-person perspective and unsettling atmosphere, it’s a journey into darkness that will leave you questioning reality.

Step into the shoes of Luca, a young man haunted by a mysterious entity known as Madison. Armed with an instant camera, you must navigate a cursed house filled with puzzles, eerie phenomena, and unspeakable horrors. The game masterfully blends psychological terror with survival mechanics, creating an experience that’s as tense as it is unforgettable.

## Key Features

### Instant Camera Mechanic
Use the instant camera to uncover hidden clues, solve puzzles, and interact with the supernatural. Every photo could reveal something horrifying.

### Psychological Horror
Madison delves deep into psychological terror, blending disturbing visuals with a narrative that keeps you on edge. Expect mind-bending twists and a constant sense of dread.

### Immersive Atmosphere
The game’s detailed environments and haunting sound design create an oppressive atmosphere that draws you into its nightmarish world.

### Challenging Puzzles
Solve intricate puzzles that require both logic and creativity. Each solution brings you closer to uncovering the truth—or deeper into madness.

### Dynamic Storytelling
Experience a story that evolves based on your actions and decisions. Your choices shape Luca’s fate and the horrors he encounters.

## Gameplay Overview
Madison combines exploration, puzzle-solving, and survival horror in a seamless experience. Players must carefully manage resources, avoid danger, and use the instant camera to progress. The game’s mechanics are designed to keep you immersed, with every decision feeling consequential. Whether you’re deciphering cryptic clues or fleeing from unspeakable entities, Madison delivers a gripping and terrifying adventure.

frontmatter.title: Madison
frontmatter.description: Madison is a chilling psychological horror game that plunges players into a terrifying first-person survival experience. Solve puzzles, uncover dark secrets, and face unimaginable horrors in this immersive and atmospheric nightmare.

content:
One More Island is a strategy-simulation game that immerses players in the role of an island manager. Your goal is to transform a small, uninhabited island into a thriving paradise. With a blend of exploration, resource management, and strategic planning, every decision shapes the future of your island.

## Key Features

### Dynamic Island Ecosystem
Experience a living, breathing island where weather, wildlife, and resources change dynamically. Adapt your strategies to survive and thrive.

### Deep Resource Management
Manage a variety of resources, from food and timber to rare minerals. Balance your economy to sustain growth and expansion.

### Multiplayer Collaboration
Team up with friends in multiplayer mode to build interconnected island networks. Trade resources and share strategies for mutual success.

### Customizable Island Layout
Design your island with complete freedom. Place buildings, roads, and decorations to create a unique paradise that reflects your vision.

### Challenging Scenarios
Face unpredictable events like storms, droughts, and pirate raids. Overcome these challenges to prove your island management skills.

## Gameplay Overview
In One More Island, players start with a basic island and gradually expand their territory. Gather resources, construct buildings, and attract settlers to grow your population. The game combines strategic planning with creative freedom, allowing players to experiment with different layouts and management styles. Whether you prefer a bustling metropolis or a serene retreat, One More Island offers endless possibilities. The multiplayer mode adds a social dimension, encouraging collaboration and competition. With its engaging mechanics and vibrant world, One More Island promises hours of immersive gameplay.

frontmatter.title: One More Island
frontmatter.description: One More Island is a captivating strategy-simulation game where players build and manage their own island paradise. Explore, expand, and thrive in a dynamic world filled with challenges and opportunities.

content:
Jalopy offers a one-of-a-kind driving adventure that blends simulation, survival, and exploration into a memorable experience.

Step into the driver’s seat of a dilapidated Laika 601 Deluxe and embark on a journey across Eastern Europe. Jalopy challenges you to keep your car running through meticulous maintenance, resource management, and strategic upgrades. The game’s open-world setting invites you to explore towns, highways, and countryside, uncovering secrets and opportunities along the way.

## Key Features

### Authentic Car Maintenance
Keep your Laika 601 Deluxe in working order by repairing parts, replacing components, and ensuring it’s fueled up for the road ahead.

### Dynamic Road Trips
Traverse a vast open world inspired by Eastern Europe, with procedurally generated events and encounters that make every trip unique.

### Resource Management
Scavenge for parts, buy and sell goods, and manage your budget to keep your car and journey alive.

### Realistic Driving Physics
Experience a driving simulation that emphasizes realism, from gear shifting to handling the challenges of an aging vehicle.

### Upgrades and Customization
Improve your car’s performance and appearance with a variety of upgrades, making it more reliable and stylish.

## Gameplay Overview

Jalopy’s gameplay revolves around balancing survival and exploration. You’ll need to monitor your car’s condition, plan routes carefully, and make smart decisions to ensure a successful journey. The game’s immersive mechanics, such as manual gear shifting and realistic fuel consumption, add depth to the driving experience. Whether you’re navigating treacherous roads or discovering hidden locations, Jalopy offers a captivating blend of challenge and adventure.

frontmatter.title: Jalopy
frontmatter.description: Jalopy is a unique driving simulation game where you embark on a road trip adventure across Eastern Europe in a rusty old car. Manage fuel, repairs, and upgrades while exploring a vast open world in this survival-driving experience.

content:
Apico is a delightful blend of farming simulation and sandbox creativity, where players become beekeepers in a vibrant pixel-art world. The game combines resource management, exploration, and conservation in a relaxing, nature-filled setting.

In Apico, you'll start with a humble apiary and gradually build your bee-keeping empire across multiple magical islands. The game puts a unique spin on farming sims by focusing on bee breeding, honey production, and ecosystem restoration. With its colorful visuals and soothing gameplay, Apico offers a fresh take on the genre that's perfect for players who enjoy peaceful, creative experiences.

## Key Features

### Bee Breeding & Genetics
Apico features an in-depth bee breeding system where players cross different species to discover new genetic traits and rare bee variants. Each bee has unique characteristics that affect honey production and behavior.

### Island Exploration
Discover multiple biomes across procedurally generated islands, each with distinct flora, fauna, and bee species to collect. Exploration rewards players with new resources and bee habitats to cultivate.

### Honey Production Chain
Process raw honey into various products through a multi-step crafting system, from simple honeycombs to complex meads and cosmetics. Manage your production chain to maximize profits.

### Ecosystem Restoration
Help restore balance to the game world by repopulating endangered bee species and rehabilitating damaged environments. Your conservation efforts directly impact the world's biodiversity.

### Cozy Multiplayer
Play solo or team up with friends in cooperative multiplayer to build apiaries together, trade bee species, and collaborate on large-scale conservation projects.

## Gameplay Overview

Apico's gameplay revolves around managing your apiary while exploring the surrounding islands. Players will catch wild bees, build specialized hives, and experiment with cross-breeding to create productive new species. The game progresses through seasons, with different flowers and bee behaviors changing throughout the year.

Beyond bee-keeping, players can engage in fishing, foraging, and crafting to support their apiary operations. The game offers multiple progression paths, allowing players to focus on honey production, bee conservation, or building the most efficient apiary layout. With its stress-free pace and rewarding gameplay loops, Apico creates a uniquely relaxing farming experience.

frontmatter.title: Apico
frontmatter.description: Apico is a charming indie farming sim focused on bee-keeping, conservation, and crafting. Breed unique bees, explore vibrant biomes, and restore ecosystems in this cozy sandbox adventure.

content:
Scrap Mechanic is a sandbox game that combines creativity, survival, and exploration into one thrilling experience. Build, craft, and survive in a world where your ingenuity is your greatest tool.

In Scrap Mechanic, players step into the shoes of a mechanic stranded on a mysterious planet. The game blends survival mechanics with creative freedom, allowing you to design vehicles, construct bases, and fend off hostile robots. Whether you’re exploring vast landscapes or collaborating with friends in multiplayer mode, Scrap Mechanic offers endless possibilities for adventure and innovation.

## Key Features

### Creative Building
Design and build anything from simple vehicles to complex machines using a wide array of parts and tools. The intuitive building system lets you bring your wildest ideas to life.

### Survival Challenges
Survive in a hostile environment filled with robotic enemies. Scavenge for resources, craft weapons, and fortify your base to stay alive.

### Multiplayer Mode
Team up with friends in cooperative multiplayer mode. Work together to build, explore, and survive in this dynamic world.

### Exploration
Discover diverse biomes, hidden treasures, and unique challenges as you explore the vast open world of Scrap Mechanic.

### Customization
Personalize your creations with a variety of materials, colors, and designs. The game’s customization options ensure every build is unique.

## Gameplay Overview
Scrap Mechanic’s core gameplay revolves around creativity and survival. Players gather resources to craft tools, vehicles, and structures while defending against robotic threats. The game’s physics-based mechanics add a layer of realism, making every build and interaction feel rewarding. Whether you’re a solo player or part of a team, Scrap Mechanic offers a sandbox experience like no other.

frontmatter.title: Scrap Mechanic
frontmatter.description: Scrap Mechanic is a creative sandbox survival game where players build, craft, and explore a vibrant world filled with challenges. Design vehicles, survive robotic threats, and unleash your imagination in this unique crafting adventure.

content:
Farmer's Life invites you to escape to the countryside and experience the joys of farming. With its vibrant visuals and relaxing gameplay, it's the perfect game for players of all ages.

In Farmer's Life, you start with a small plot of land and a handful of seeds. As you cultivate your farm, you'll grow crops, raise animals, and expand your homestead. The game offers a peaceful, open-world experience where you can explore the countryside, interact with villagers, and even uncover hidden secrets. Whether you're a seasoned farmer or a newcomer to the genre, Farmer's Life provides a rewarding and immersive experience.

## Key Features

### Expansive Farm Customization
Customize every inch of your farm with a variety of buildings, decorations, and layouts. Create the farm of your dreams, from cozy cottages to sprawling fields.

### Diverse Crops and Animals
Grow over 50 types of crops and raise a variety of animals, including cows, chickens, and sheep. Each has unique needs and rewards, adding depth to your farming experience.

### Dynamic Seasons
Experience the changing seasons, each affecting your farm in different ways. Plan your activities around the weather and seasonal events to maximize your harvest.

### Engaging Villagers
Meet and befriend a cast of charming villagers, each with their own stories and quests. Build relationships and unlock special rewards as you become part of the community.

### Relaxing Exploration
Take a break from farming to explore the picturesque countryside. Discover hidden treasures, fishing spots, and secret areas that add to the game's charm.

## Gameplay Overview

Farmer's Life combines traditional farming mechanics with a relaxing, open-world experience. Players start with basic tools and must gradually expand their farm by planting crops, tending to animals, and completing quests. The game emphasizes creativity and strategy, allowing players to design their farm layout and choose which crops to focus on.

Beyond farming, the game offers a variety of activities, such as fishing, foraging, and crafting. The dynamic weather and seasonal changes keep the gameplay fresh, while the engaging villagers add a social element. Whether you prefer a structured routine or a more laid-back approach, Farmer's Life caters to all playstyles with its flexible and rewarding mechanics.

frontmatter.title: Farmer's Life
frontmatter.description: Farmer's Life is a charming farming simulation game where you build your dream farm from scratch. Grow crops, raise animals, and explore a vibrant countryside in this relaxing, family-friendly adventure.

content:
Project Zomboid is a brutally challenging survival game set in a post-apocalyptic world overrun by the undead. With its focus on realism and depth, it offers a unique experience for fans of the genre.

In Project Zomboid, players find themselves in the midst of a zombie outbreak in Knox County. The game emphasizes survival, requiring players to manage hunger, fatigue, and injuries while avoiding or fighting hordes of zombies. The open-world sandbox allows for endless possibilities, from building fortresses to scavenging for supplies.

## Key Features

### Permadeath System
Once you die, your character is gone forever, adding tension and stakes to every decision.

### Dynamic World
The world evolves over time, with zombies migrating and environmental changes affecting survival strategies.

### Crafting and Building
Players can craft tools, weapons, and fortifications to enhance their chances of survival.

### Multiplayer Mode
Team up with friends or face the apocalypse alone in both cooperative and competitive multiplayer modes.

### Realistic Survival Mechanics
Manage hunger, thirst, and mental health while navigating the dangers of the infected world.

## Gameplay Overview

Project Zomboid’s gameplay revolves around resource management and strategic planning. Players must scavenge for food, water, and weapons while avoiding detection by zombies. The game’s isometric view allows for tactical combat and exploration. With no set objectives, players are free to create their own stories in this unforgiving world. Whether you’re fortifying a safehouse or venturing into the unknown, every choice matters in Project Zomboid.

frontmatter.title: Project Zomboid
frontmatter.description: Project Zomboid is an open-world survival horror game where players must scavenge, build, and fight to stay alive in a zombie apocalypse. Experience intense gameplay and permadeath in this immersive sandbox world.

content:
Embark on a thrilling underwater adventure with 'We Need to Go Deeper,' a steampunk roguelike submarine game. Dive into procedurally generated depths, face dangerous creatures, and uncover ancient mysteries.

In 'We Need to Go Deeper,' you and your crew command a submarine through treacherous waters. The game blends exploration, survival, and teamwork as you navigate the unpredictable dangers of the deep. With a steampunk aesthetic and roguelike mechanics, every journey offers a unique challenge.

## Key Features

### Procedurally Generated Depths
Explore an ever-changing underwater world filled with unique biomes, treasures, and threats.

### Cooperative Gameplay
Team up with friends to manage submarine systems, repair damage, and fend off enemies.

### Steampunk Aesthetic
Immerse yourself in a richly detailed steampunk universe with unique submarines and gadgets.

### Roguelike Challenges
Face permadeath and unpredictable encounters, requiring strategy and adaptability.

### Diverse Enemies
Battle a variety of underwater creatures, from aggressive fish to mysterious leviathans.

### Upgradeable Submarines
Enhance your vessel with new weapons, modules, and equipment to survive deeper expeditions.

## Gameplay Overview
In 'We Need to Go Deeper,' players take on roles such as captain, engineer, and gunner to operate a submarine. Each role is crucial for survival, whether navigating, repairing, or fighting off threats. The game emphasizes teamwork, with players coordinating to overcome challenges.

As you descend, you'll encounter procedurally generated levels, each with unique hazards and rewards. Manage resources, upgrade your submarine, and uncover the secrets of the deep. With its blend of strategy, action, and cooperation, 'We Need to Go Deeper' offers a captivating experience for players seeking adventure.

frontmatter.title: We Need to Go Deeper
frontmatter.description: Dive into 'We Need to Go Deeper' — a steampunk roguelike submarine adventure. Explore the depths, survive perilous encounters, and work with friends in this thrilling co-op experience.

content:
My Time at Portia is a heartwarming life simulation RPG set in a post-apocalyptic world where humanity is rebuilding. As a budding Builder, you inherit your Pa's workshop in the charming town of Portia and must restore it to its former glory while forging relationships with the townsfolk.

In My Time at Portia, you'll explore a vibrant open world filled with ruins to uncover, resources to gather, and mysteries to solve. The game blends farming, crafting, and social simulation with light RPG elements, offering a relaxing yet engaging experience. Whether you're tending crops, completing commissions, or battling creatures in dungeons, Portia is full of opportunities to leave your mark.

## Key Features

### Workshop Restoration
Rebuild and upgrade your workshop to take on bigger commissions and craft more advanced items, from furniture to bridges that help the town grow.

### Farming and Crafting
Grow crops, raise animals, and gather resources to fuel your crafting endeavors. Every item you create helps improve Portia and your reputation.

### Social Simulation
Befriend (or romance) Portia's colorful residents through gifts, conversations, and shared activities. Each character has a unique personality and story to uncover.

### Exploration and Combat
Venture into ruins and dungeons to gather rare materials and battle creatures. The world is full of secrets waiting to be discovered.

### Dynamic Events
Participate in festivals, competitions, and story-driven events that change with the seasons and your progress.

## Gameplay Overview

My Time at Portia combines the best of life sims and RPGs with a focus on creativity and community. Players manage their workshop, fulfilling commissions to earn money and reputation while exploring the world for resources. The game's day-night cycle and seasonal changes keep gameplay fresh, with new events and challenges appearing regularly.

Combat is simple but satisfying, with a variety of weapons and tools to master. The real heart of the game lies in its storytelling and character interactions, making every playthrough unique based on your choices and relationships. Whether you're a completionist or prefer to take things slow, Portia offers a welcoming world to lose yourself in.

frontmatter.title: My Time at Portia
frontmatter.description: My Time at Portia is a charming life simulation RPG where you rebuild your Pa's workshop, explore a vibrant post-apocalyptic world, and befriend quirky townsfolk. Farm, craft, and uncover secrets in this cozy adventure.

recommended.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX970 | AMD Radeon RX 570

content:
Step into the shoes of a one-person renovation crew in *House Flipper*, where every dirty wall and broken floor is a blank canvas for your creativity. This simulation game blends strategy, design, and hands-on DIY action for a satisfying gameplay loop.

In *House Flipper*, you’ll start with small, dilapidated properties, scrubbing, painting, and rebuilding your way to profitability. As you earn money, take on bigger projects—from cozy apartments to sprawling mansions—and customize every detail to attract buyers or create your perfect home. The game’s sandbox mode lets you unleash your inner interior designer without limits.

## What Makes House Flipper Special

### Realistic Renovation Tools
Wield hammers, paint rollers, and cleaning supplies to repair, upgrade, and decorate homes with physics-based interactions. Every task, from laying tiles to assembling furniture, feels tactile and rewarding.

### Dynamic Housing Market
Buy low, renovate smart, and sell high in a simulated market where buyer preferences and property conditions affect your profits. Strategize your upgrades to maximize returns.

### Creative Freedom
Choose from hundreds of decor items, wallpapers, and layouts to personalize each house. Whether you prefer minimalist modern or rustic charm, the tools are yours to experiment with.

### Satisfying Progression
Start with basic tools and small jobs, then unlock advanced skills and lucrative contracts. Watch your reputation grow as you tackle more complex renovations.

### Relaxing Gameplay
Zone out to the soothing rhythm of cleaning, painting, and decorating. *House Flipper* is as much a stress-reliever as it is a strategic challenge.

## Core Mechanics

*House Flipper* combines first-person simulation with light business management. Each job—whether a story mission or a freelance project—requires you to assess a property’s needs, budget your repairs, and execute renovations efficiently. The game’s physics-based interactions make even mundane tasks like mopping floors or hanging art feel engaging. Between contracts, manage your own portfolio of flipped houses or design a forever home in sandbox mode. With DLCs adding gardens, luxury designs, and even haunted houses, the possibilities keep expanding.

frontmatter.title: House Flipper
frontmatter.description: House Flipper is a unique simulation game where you buy, renovate, and sell houses for profit. Experience the thrill of transforming rundown properties into dream homes with realistic tools and creative freedom.

content:
Slime Rancher is a first-person life simulation adventure game set on a faraway planet teeming with quirky, gelatinous creatures called slimes. As Beatrix LeBeau, a plucky rancher, you’ll build a farm, explore diverse landscapes, and discover the secrets of the Far, Far Range.

In Slime Rancher, players embark on a whimsical journey to tame and breed slimes, each with unique behaviors and abilities. The game blends exploration, resource management, and light puzzle-solving in a colorful, open-world environment. Whether you’re vacuuming up slimes, growing crops, or trading with other ranchers, every day brings new surprises and challenges.

## Key Features

### Adorable Slime Collection
Catch and raise over 20 different slime species, from the common Pink Slime to the elusive Gold Slime. Each slime has its own diet, personality, and special abilities.

### Expansive Open World
Explore the Far, Far Range, a vast alien planet filled with diverse biomes, hidden treasures, and mysterious ruins waiting to be uncovered.

### Ranch Building
Construct and upgrade your ranch with corrals, gardens, and gadgets to automate your slime farming operations and maximize profits.

### Resource Management
Balance your slimes’ needs, grow crops, and trade plorts (slime byproducts) to expand your ranch and unlock new technologies.

### Dynamic Weather and Day-Night Cycle
Adapt to changing conditions, as weather and time of day affect slime behavior and resource availability.

## Gameplay Overview

Slime Rancher’s gameplay revolves around exploration, collection, and ranch management. Use your Vacpack to suck up slimes, resources, and plorts, then bring them back to your ranch to breed and harvest. The game’s relaxed pace allows for creativity, but strategic planning is key to optimizing your ranch’s efficiency. Unlock new areas, solve environmental puzzles, and encounter quirky characters as you uncover the planet’s secrets. With its charming visuals and addictive loop, Slime Rancher offers a delightful escape for players of all ages.

frontmatter.title: Slime Rancher
frontmatter.description: Slime Rancher is a charming open-world simulation game where you explore a vibrant alien planet, collect adorable slimes, and build a thriving ranch. Manage resources, solve puzzles, and uncover secrets in this relaxing yet engaging adventure.

content:
Terraria is a beloved 2D sandbox adventure game that blends exploration, building, and combat in a vibrant pixel-art world. With its endless creativity and dynamic gameplay, Terraria offers an experience unlike any other.

In Terraria, players start with basic tools and must gather resources, craft weapons, and build shelters to survive. The game features a day-night cycle, with peaceful days giving way to dangerous nights filled with monsters. As you progress, you'll encounter challenging bosses, discover hidden treasures, and even alter the world itself. Whether you prefer digging deep underground, constructing elaborate bases, or battling fierce enemies, Terraria caters to all playstyles.

## Key Features

### Procedurally Generated Worlds
Every new game creates a unique world with diverse biomes, underground caverns, and floating islands, ensuring no two playthroughs are the same.

### Extensive Crafting System
With hundreds of items to craft, from simple tools to powerful weapons and magical gear, creativity and resourcefulness are key to survival.

### Dynamic Events
Random events like blood moons and goblin invasions keep the gameplay fresh and unpredictable, challenging players to adapt and overcome.

### Multiplayer Mode
Team up with friends in cooperative multiplayer to explore, build, and conquer Terraria's challenges together.

### Boss Battles
Face off against towering bosses with unique mechanics, requiring strategy and preparation to defeat.

## Gameplay Overview

Terraria's gameplay revolves around exploration, crafting, and combat. Players start with minimal resources and must gather materials to craft better equipment. The world is filled with secrets, from hidden chests to rare enemies, encouraging thorough exploration. Building is a core aspect, allowing players to create anything from simple huts to sprawling castles. Combat is fast-paced, with a variety of weapons and accessories to customize your playstyle. The game's progression is nonlinear, letting players tackle challenges at their own pace. Whether you're a builder, fighter, or explorer, Terraria offers endless possibilities.

frontmatter.title: Terraria
frontmatter.description: Terraria is a 2D sandbox adventure game where players explore, build, and fight in a procedurally generated world. Dig, craft, and battle your way through day-night cycles and dynamic events in this pixel-art masterpiece.

minimum.graphics: 128 MB video memory, Shader Model 1.1 support

recommended.graphics: 256 MB video memory, Shader Model 2.0 support

content:
Retrowave is a pulse-pounding action game that combines retro aesthetics with modern gameplay. Dive into a neon-lit world inspired by the 1980s, where synthwave beats and high-octane action collide.

In Retrowave, you step into the shoes of a lone hero fighting against a dystopian corporation in a sprawling cyberpunk city. The game blends fast-paced shooting mechanics with driving segments, offering a unique mix of on-foot and vehicular combat. With its vibrant visuals, electrifying soundtrack, and challenging gameplay, Retrowave delivers an unforgettable arcade experience.

## Key Features

### Neon-Lit World
Explore a sprawling city filled with neon lights, retro-futuristic architecture, and hidden secrets. Every corner of the world is designed to immerse you in the 80s vibe.

### Synthwave Soundtrack
Immerse yourself in an electrifying soundtrack featuring iconic synthwave artists. The music evolves with the action, creating a dynamic audio experience.

### Fast-Paced Combat
Engage in intense shootouts with a variety of weapons, from classic pistols to futuristic energy guns. Precision and quick reflexes are key to survival.

### High-Speed Driving
Take control of iconic 80s-inspired cars and race through the city streets. Evade enemies, perform stunts, and unleash devastating attacks from your vehicle.

### Retro Visuals
Experience a stunning visual style that mimics the look of classic arcade games but with modern polish. The game’s art direction is a love letter to the 1980s.

## Gameplay Overview

Retrowave combines action-packed shooting sequences with thrilling driving segments. Players must navigate the city, complete objectives, and take down waves of enemies using a combination of weapons and vehicles. The game features multiple difficulty levels, unlockable upgrades, and a variety of missions to keep the experience fresh. Whether you’re dodging bullets on foot or outmaneuvering foes in your car, Retrowave offers non-stop excitement.

frontmatter.title: Retrowave
frontmatter.description: Retrowave is a neon-soaked action shooter that takes you back to the 80s with its retro-futuristic aesthetic. Battle through waves of enemies, drive high-speed cars, and immerse yourself in a synthwave soundtrack that defines the era. Perfect for fans of fast-paced arcade shooters and nostalgic vibes.

content:
Don't Starve Together is a thrilling multiplayer survival game that challenges you and your friends to endure in a harsh, unforgiving world.

In Don't Starve Together, you step into a bizarre and dangerous wilderness filled with mysterious creatures, unpredictable weather, and limited resources. The game emphasizes teamwork as you gather materials, craft tools, and build shelters to survive. With its unique art style and dark humor, it’s a survival experience like no other.

## Key Features

### Cooperative Multiplayer
Play with friends in online co-op mode, working together to gather resources, fend off enemies, and survive the harsh environment.

### Dynamic Seasons
Face changing seasons, each with unique challenges, from blistering summers to freezing winters, requiring strategic planning.

### Crafting and Building
Create a wide variety of tools, weapons, and structures to protect yourself and thrive in the wild.

### Unique Characters
Choose from a roster of quirky characters, each with special abilities and drawbacks that affect gameplay.

### Procedural Worlds
Explore randomly generated worlds filled with surprises, ensuring no two playthroughs are the same.

### Hostile Creatures
Encounter a variety of enemies, from giant spiders to mythical beasts, each requiring different strategies to defeat.

## Gameplay Overview

Don't Starve Together focuses on survival mechanics, requiring players to manage hunger, health, and sanity while exploring and crafting. The game’s permadeath system adds tension, making every decision critical. Players must adapt to the environment, gather resources, and collaborate to overcome the challenges of the wilderness. With its blend of exploration, strategy, and teamwork, Don't Starve Together offers a unique and engaging survival experience.

frontmatter.title: Don't Starve Together
frontmatter.description: Don't Starve Together is a multiplayer survival game where you and your friends face the wilderness, craft tools, and fend off creatures. Explore, build, and survive in this challenging sandbox adventure.

content:
Oxygen Not Included is a critically acclaimed survival simulation game that challenges players to manage a colony of duplicants in an unforgiving underground asteroid environment. With its deep systems and charming art style, it offers a unique blend of strategy and creativity.

In Oxygen Not Included, you guide a group of duplicants as they struggle to survive in a harsh, oxygen-deprived world. The game combines base-building, resource management, and physics simulation to create a complex yet rewarding experience. Your colony's survival depends on your ability to balance oxygen production, food supply, and waste management while exploring the asteroid's depths.

## Key Features

### Complex Colony Management
Manage every aspect of your duplicants' lives, from their jobs and stress levels to their bodily functions. Keep them happy and productive to ensure your colony thrives.

### Deep Physics Simulation
Oxygen Not Included features a detailed physics system where gases, liquids, and heat behave realistically. Master these systems to create efficient bases and solve environmental challenges.

### Procedurally Generated Worlds
Each playthrough offers a unique asteroid with different biomes, resources, and challenges. No two colonies are ever the same.

### Research and Technology
Unlock new technologies to expand your colony's capabilities. From basic oxygen diffusers to advanced space-age machinery, progress is key to survival.

### Stress and Morale System
Your duplicants have personalities and needs. Manage their stress and morale to prevent breakdowns and maintain productivity.

## Gameplay Overview

Oxygen Not Included challenges players to think critically about resource management and colony design. You'll need to plan carefully, as every decision—from where to place a toilet to how to vent carbon dioxide—can have long-term consequences. The game's systems are interconnected, creating emergent gameplay where small changes can lead to unexpected outcomes.

As you progress, you'll encounter new challenges like temperature regulation, disease control, and even space exploration. The game rewards creativity and problem-solving, offering endless replayability as you refine your strategies and tackle increasingly complex scenarios.

frontmatter.title: Oxygen Not Included
frontmatter.description: Oxygen Not Included is a space-colony simulation game where you manage duplicants in an underground asteroid base. Build, survive, and master physics in this challenging survival-strategy game with deep systems and humor.

content:
Step into the shoes of a master thief in *American Theft 80s*, a game that blends open-world freedom with tense stealth mechanics. Set in a vibrant 1980s America, this title lets you live out your wildest criminal fantasies while soaking in the era's iconic style.

## Key Features

### Neon-Soaked Open World
Explore a sprawling city dripping with 80s nostalgia, complete with retro cars, neon signs, and a synthwave soundtrack that sets the mood for your heists.

### Dynamic Heist System
Plan and execute elaborate thefts with multiple approaches - go in guns blazing or use stealth to avoid detection entirely. Every mission offers creative freedom.

### Period-Accurate Arsenal
Wield an authentic collection of 1980s weapons and gadgets, from silenced pistols to cutting-edge (for the time) lockpicking tools.

### Living, Reactive World
Your actions have consequences - increased police presence, wary civilians, and rival gangs that remember your past exploits.

### Deep Character Progression
Build your thief from the ground up, specializing in specific criminal skills to match your preferred playstyle.

## Gameplay Overview

*American Theft 80s* combines open-world exploration with mission-based heists that reward creativity. The core gameplay revolves around reconnaissance - studying locations, identifying security weaknesses, and choosing your approach. Whether you prefer silent infiltration or chaotic getaways, the game adapts to your choices.

Beyond main missions, you'll find side activities like car theft rings, underground fight clubs, and black market dealings. The 80s setting isn't just aesthetic - it influences gameplay mechanics, from limited technology to era-specific law enforcement tactics. Expect a challenging but rewarding crime simulator that captures the spirit of classic heist movies.

frontmatter.title: American Theft 80s
frontmatter.description: American Theft 80s is a thrilling open-world stealth-action game where you play as a cunning thief in a neon-soaked 1980s America. Pull off heists, evade the law, and live the ultimate criminal fantasy in this retro-inspired adventure.

minimum.processor: Intel Core i5-4460 or AMD FX-8350
minimum.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 760 or AMD Radeon R7 260x

recommended.processor: Intel Core i7-7700K or AMD Ryzen 5 2600
recommended.graphics: NVIDIA GeForce GTX 1070 or AMD Radeon RX 5700

content:
My Summer Car is a one-of-a-kind simulation experience that blends car building, survival, and open-world exploration into a challenging yet rewarding adventure.

Set in the Finnish countryside during the 1990s, My Summer Car puts you in the shoes of a young car enthusiast tasked with building and maintaining a custom car from scratch. From meticulously assembling engine parts to navigating the rural roads, every detail matters. But life isn’t just about cars—you’ll also need to manage hunger, hygiene, and finances to survive in this unforgiving yet immersive world.

## Key Features

### Detailed Car Assembly
Build your car piece by piece, ensuring every bolt and wire is correctly installed for optimal performance.

### Realistic Survival Mechanics
Manage your character’s needs, including food, sleep, and hygiene, while juggling car repairs and daily tasks.

### Open-World Exploration
Navigate a vast rural landscape, complete with winding roads, small towns, and hidden secrets to uncover.

### Authentic Finnish Setting
Immerse yourself in a 1990s Finland-inspired world, complete with cultural details and period-accurate items.

### Dynamic Car Maintenance
Keep your car running smoothly by performing regular maintenance, fixing breakdowns, and upgrading parts.

## Gameplay Overview

My Summer Car offers a hands-on, immersive experience where players must balance car-building with survival. The game’s open-world sandbox structure allows for freedom in how you approach tasks, whether it’s completing the car build, exploring the countryside, or simply surviving the challenges of daily life. With its realistic mechanics and attention to detail, My Summer Car provides a unique blend of simulation and survival that keeps players engaged and challenged.

frontmatter.title: My Summer Car
frontmatter.description: My Summer Car is a unique car-building and survival simulation game set in 1990s Finland. Players assemble, maintain, and drive a custom car while managing life's challenges in a detailed open world.

content:
Forager is a charming 2D sandbox adventure where players explore, craft, and build their way to prosperity. Set in a colorful pixel-art world, the game blends RPG elements with addictive resource management and base-building mechanics.

In Forager, you start with nothing but a small plot of land and a dream. As you gather resources, craft tools, and expand your territory, you'll uncover secrets, battle enemies, and solve puzzles. The game's loop of discovery and progression is endlessly satisfying, with new biomes, dungeons, and challenges awaiting at every turn.

## Key Features

### Addictive Crafting System
Gather materials to craft tools, weapons, and structures, unlocking new recipes as you progress.

### Expansive Base Building
Claim land, construct buildings, and automate production to create your ideal empire.

### Dynamic Exploration
Discover diverse biomes, hidden dungeons, and mysterious puzzles scattered across the world.

### RPG Progression
Level up your skills, unlock powerful abilities, and customize your playstyle.

### Quirky NPCs
Meet eccentric characters who offer quests, trades, and unique interactions.

## Gameplay Overview

Forager's gameplay revolves around a satisfying loop of gathering, crafting, and expanding. Players start by collecting basic resources like wood and stone, which are used to craft tools and structures. As you progress, you'll unlock new technologies, automate production, and explore procedurally generated areas filled with secrets.

The game combines elements of farming sims, dungeon crawlers, and idle games into a unique experience. Combat is simple but engaging, with a variety of weapons and spells to discover. The real joy comes from watching your empire grow, as you transform barren land into a thriving, automated paradise.

frontmatter.title: Forager
frontmatter.description: Forager is a vibrant open-world adventure game combining crafting, exploration, and base-building. Gather resources, solve puzzles, and expand your empire in this addictive 2D sandbox experience.

content:
People Playground is a sandbox game that blends creativity and destruction in a physics-driven environment. With endless tools and objects at your disposal, the game encourages experimentation and imagination.

In People Playground, players are given a blank canvas filled with interactive elements like ragdolls, weapons, and machinery. Create elaborate contraptions, test the limits of physics, or simply wreak havoc in a fully destructible world. The game’s open-ended nature allows for limitless possibilities, making it a playground for both creativity and chaos.

## Key Features

### Dynamic Physics Engine
Experience realistic physics interactions that make every experiment feel unique. From collisions to explosions, the world reacts naturally to your actions.

### Extensive Toolset
Choose from a wide range of tools, weapons, and objects to create, destroy, or experiment. The possibilities are endless.

### Destructible Environment
Break, burn, or obliterate everything in sight. The environment is fully interactive and reacts to your destructive tendencies.

### Ragdoll Mechanics
Manipulate ragdolls with precision, testing their limits in creative and often hilarious ways.

### Open-Ended Gameplay
There are no set goals or objectives. Play your way and explore the sandbox at your own pace.

## Gameplay Overview
People Playground revolves around experimentation and discovery. Players can spawn objects, ragdolls, and tools to create scenarios or test ideas. The game’s physics engine ensures that every interaction feels realistic and unpredictable. Whether you’re building intricate machines or causing chaos, the experience is entirely up to you. With no rules or objectives, People Playground is a true sandbox where imagination is the only limit.

frontmatter.title: People Playground
frontmatter.description: People Playground is a physics-based sandbox game where creativity meets chaos. Experiment with ragdolls, weapons, and tools in a dynamic environment. Unleash destruction, test contraptions, and explore endless possibilities in this unique simulation experience.

content:
Welcome to NightClub Simulator, where the nightlife never stops! This immersive simulation game lets you take charge of every aspect of running a bustling nightclub, from designing the layout to managing staff and keeping the drinks flowing.

NightClub Simulator drops you into a dynamic urban setting where your creativity and strategic thinking will determine your success. Will you create a luxurious hotspot for elite clientele or a wild party hub for the masses? The choice is yours. With endless customization options and realistic management mechanics, NightClub Simulator offers a unique blend of strategy and creativity.

## Key Features

### Club Customization
Design every detail of your nightclub, from the dance floor layout to the lighting and decor. Unlock new themes and upgrades as you progress.

### Staff Management
Hire and train bartenders, bouncers, and DJs to keep your club running smoothly. Manage their schedules and ensure customer satisfaction.

### Dynamic Events
Host themed nights, live performances, and special events to attract diverse crowds and boost your club’s reputation.

### Financial Strategy
Balance your budget, adjust drink prices, and invest in upgrades to maximize profits while keeping your patrons happy.

### VIP System
Attract high-profile guests and cater to their unique demands to earn exclusive rewards and elevate your club’s status.

## Gameplay Overview

NightClub Simulator challenges you to think like a true entrepreneur. Start with a modest venue and expand your empire by attracting more customers and earning higher profits. Manage resources wisely, handle unexpected challenges like unruly guests or equipment malfunctions, and keep the energy high to become the ultimate nightlife mogul. With its engaging mechanics and endless replayability, NightClub Simulator offers a thrilling experience for fans of management and simulation games.

frontmatter.title: NightClub Simulator
frontmatter.description: Step into the neon-lit world of NightClub Simulator, a vibrant management game where you build, customize, and run the hottest nightclub in town. Balance finances, attract VIPs, and keep the party going!

content:
Brutalistick VR transports players into a dystopian future where brutalist architecture dominates the landscape. This VR shooter combines fast-paced action with a unique aesthetic, offering an unforgettable experience.

In Brutalistick VR, you are a rebel fighting against a tyrannical regime in a world where concrete and steel reign supreme. The game blends intense combat with exploration, allowing players to uncover the secrets of this oppressive society. With its immersive VR mechanics and visually striking environments, Brutalistick VR pushes the boundaries of virtual reality gaming.

## Key Features

### Immersive Brutalist World
Explore a dystopian cityscape filled with towering brutalist structures, underground bunkers, and hidden secrets. The world is both oppressive and beautiful.

### Futuristic Weaponry
Wield an arsenal of advanced weapons, from plasma rifles to gravity-defying grenades, each designed to feel realistic and powerful in VR.

### Tactical Combat
Engage in fast-paced, tactical battles that require quick thinking and precision. Use cover, environmental hazards, and clever strategies to survive.

### Multiplayer Mode
Team up with friends or compete against others in adrenaline-pumping multiplayer modes. Cooperation and skill are key to victory.

### Customizable Loadouts
Tailor your weapons and gear to suit your playstyle. Experiment with different combinations to dominate the battlefield.

## Gameplay Overview
Brutalistick VR combines intuitive VR controls with deep gameplay mechanics. Players can physically duck, dodge, and aim, making every encounter feel authentic. The game emphasizes skill and strategy, rewarding players who master its systems. Whether you're exploring the world or engaging in intense firefights, Brutalistick VR offers a thrilling and immersive experience.

frontmatter.title: Brutalistick VR
frontmatter.description: Brutalistick VR is a high-octane VR shooter set in a dystopian brutalist world. Fight through intense battles, master futuristic weapons, and survive in a visually stunning, immersive environment.

content:
Vertigo 2 is a groundbreaking VR experience that pushes the boundaries of immersive gameplay. Set in a futuristic sci-fi universe, this action-packed adventure combines intense combat, intricate storytelling, and stunning visuals to deliver an unforgettable journey.

In Vertigo 2, players step into the shoes of a reluctant hero navigating a sprawling underground facility filled with strange creatures, advanced technology, and hidden secrets. With its blend of exploration, puzzle-solving, and fast-paced combat, Vertigo 2 offers a unique VR experience that keeps players engaged from start to finish.

## Key Features

### Immersive VR Environments
Explore a meticulously crafted sci-fi world filled with intricate details, from alien landscapes to high-tech facilities, all designed to immerse you fully in the experience.

### Intense Combat System
Engage in thrilling battles using a variety of weapons and gadgets, each designed to feel realistic and responsive in VR.

### Gripping Storyline
Uncover a deep and engaging narrative filled with twists, turns, and memorable characters that drive the adventure forward.

### Puzzle-Solving Elements
Challenge your mind with clever puzzles that require both logic and creativity to solve, adding depth to the gameplay.

### Dynamic Enemy Encounters
Face off against a diverse array of enemies, each with unique behaviors and attack patterns that keep combat fresh and exciting.

## Gameplay Overview

Vertigo 2 combines exploration, combat, and puzzle-solving into a seamless VR experience. Players will navigate through sprawling environments, using intuitive VR controls to interact with the world and solve challenges. The game’s combat system is designed to feel natural in VR, with precise aiming and responsive mechanics that make every encounter thrilling. Whether you’re battling alien creatures or uncovering the secrets of the facility, Vertigo 2 offers a rich and rewarding gameplay experience that showcases the potential of VR gaming.

frontmatter.title: Vertigo 2
frontmatter.description: Vertigo 2 is a thrilling VR action-adventure game set in a futuristic sci-fi world. Dive into intense combat, explore immersive environments, and uncover a gripping story. Perfect for fans of VR shooters and sci-fi adventures.

content:
The Walking Dead: Saints & Sinners brings the brutal world of the Walking Dead to life in virtual reality. Set in the flooded ruins of New Orleans, players must survive the undead hordes while navigating the dangerous factions vying for control.

In The Walking Dead: Saints & Sinners, you play as a survivor caught between warring groups in a zombie-infested New Orleans. Every decision matters as you scavenge for supplies, craft weapons, and face moral dilemmas that shape your story. The game's realistic VR mechanics make every encounter with the undead feel terrifyingly visceral.

## Key Features

### Immersive VR Combat
Engage in brutal melee combat with physics-based weapon handling. Every swing, stab, and block feels realistic in VR.

### Moral Choice System
Your decisions impact the world and its inhabitants. Choose who to help or betray, with consequences that ripple through the story.

### Dynamic Zombie AI
The undead react to sound and movement, creating tense situations where stealth and strategy are key to survival.

### Crafting & Scavenging
Salvage materials from the environment to craft weapons, tools, and supplies essential for staying alive.

### Living World
New Orleans evolves based on your actions, with factions remembering your choices and changing their behavior accordingly.

## Gameplay Overview

The Walking Dead: Saints & Sinners combines survival horror with deep RPG elements. Players explore flooded districts of New Orleans, managing stamina, inventory, and weapon durability while facing both zombies and human threats. The game's day/night cycle adds tension, with nights being particularly dangerous.

Combat requires physical movement in VR - you'll need to actually aim guns, swing melee weapons, and block attacks. The physics system means weapons can get stuck in zombies, and environmental objects can be used as improvised tools or weapons. Story missions intertwine with survival gameplay, creating a compelling narrative-driven experience.

frontmatter.title: The Walking Dead: Saints & Sinners
frontmatter.description: The Walking Dead: Saints & Sinners is a gripping VR survival horror game set in post-apocalyptic New Orleans. Fight zombies, make moral choices, and scavenge for resources in this intense action-adventure experience.

content:
Sweet Surrender VR is a heart-pounding roguelike shooter designed exclusively for virtual reality. Step into a dystopian future where you must navigate procedurally generated levels, battle relentless enemies, and uncover the secrets of a collapsing megastructure.

In Sweet Surrender VR, you play as a lone operative tasked with infiltrating a massive, decaying megastructure. Each run is unique, with procedurally generated levels that ensure no two playthroughs are the same. Armed with an arsenal of futuristic weapons, you’ll face off against waves of robotic and organic foes, using VR mechanics to dodge, aim, and strategize in real-time.

## Key Features

### Procedurally Generated Levels
Every playthrough offers a fresh challenge with dynamically generated maps, ensuring endless replayability and unpredictability.

### Diverse Weapons Arsenal
Choose from a variety of futuristic weapons, each with unique stats and handling, to adapt to your playstyle and the challenges ahead.

### Immersive VR Combat
Engage in fast-paced, tactile combat with intuitive VR controls, including manual reloading, precise aiming, and dynamic movement.

### Upgrades and Perks
Collect power-ups and unlock permanent upgrades between runs to enhance your abilities and increase your chances of survival.

### Atmospheric Sci-Fi Setting
Explore a visually stunning dystopian world filled with detailed environments, eerie soundscapes, and a compelling narrative.

## Gameplay Overview
Sweet Surrender VR combines the intensity of a roguelike with the immersion of VR. Players must navigate procedurally generated levels, scavenge for resources, and defeat enemies to progress. The game emphasizes skill-based gameplay, requiring quick reflexes, strategic thinking, and mastery of VR mechanics. Between runs, players can unlock upgrades and perks to strengthen their character, adding a layer of progression to the roguelike experience. Whether you’re a VR veteran or new to the platform, Sweet Surrender VR offers a challenging yet rewarding adventure.

frontmatter.title: Sweet Surrender VR
frontmatter.description: Dive into Sweet Surrender VR, a thrilling roguelike shooter set in a dystopian sci-fi world. Experience fast-paced combat, procedurally generated levels, and immersive VR gameplay as you fight for survival.

content:
Blair Witch VR takes you deep into the heart of one of the most infamous horror legends. This VR adaptation brings the terror closer than ever, immersing you in a world of fear and mystery.

In Blair Witch VR, you play as a former police officer drawn into the Black Hills Forest to search for a missing boy. As you navigate the dense woods, you’ll encounter supernatural forces, solve puzzles, and confront your darkest fears. The game masterfully blends psychological horror with survival elements, creating an unforgettable experience.

## Key Features

### Immersive VR Experience
Blair Witch VR leverages cutting-edge VR technology to make you feel like you’re truly in the forest. Every sound, shadow, and movement adds to the tension.

### Psychological Horror
The game delves deep into psychological horror, playing with your mind and making you question what’s real. The Blair Witch legend comes to life in terrifying ways.

### Dynamic Environment
The Black Hills Forest is a living, breathing world. The environment changes based on your actions, ensuring no two playthroughs are the same.

### Puzzle Solving
Surviving in Blair Witch VR requires more than just courage. You’ll need to solve intricate puzzles to progress, adding a layer of strategy to the horror.

### Companion System
Your loyal dog, Bullet, is your only ally in the forest. He helps you navigate and alerts you to dangers, but even he can’t protect you from everything.

## Gameplay Overview
